meanings.meaning_cn: 特殊的，特定的；明确的；详细的；[药] 具有特效的
meanings.meaning_en: a specific thing, person, or group is one particular thing, person, or group
meanings.example: games suitable for specific age groups
meanings.example_cn: 适合特定年龄组的游戏

meanings.meaning_en: particular details
meanings.example: a specific example of alcohol’s effect on the body
meanings.example_cn: 酒精对身体影响的具体例子

meanings.meaning_en: the imaginary line around which a large round object, such as the Earth, turns
meanings.example: The Earth rotates on an axis between the north and south poles.
meanings.example_cn: 地球绕着南北两极之间的地轴自转。

meanings.meaning_en: any member of the Eukarya, a domain of organisms having cells each with a distinct nucleus within which the genetic material is contained
meanings.example: Many research teams have been striving to determine the structure of a eukaryote ribosome (see 'Structures of desire').
meanings.example_cn: 许多研究小组力求确定一个真核核糖的结构（看到向往的结构）。

meanings.meaning_cn: 优先；优先权；[数] 优先次序；优先考虑的事
meanings.meaning_en: the thing that you think is most important and that needs attention before anything else
meanings.example: The club’s priority is to win the League.
meanings.example_cn: 该俱乐部首先考虑的是要赢得联赛。

meanings.meaning_cn: 入口；门槛；开始；极限；临界值
meanings.meaning_en: the entrance to a room or building, or the area of floor or ground at the entrance
meanings.example: She opened the door and stepped across the threshold.
meanings.example_cn: 她打开门，跨过门槛。

meanings.meaning_cn: 模糊的；含糊的；不明确的；暧昧的
meanings.meaning_en: unclear because someone does not give enough detailed information or does not say exactly what they mean
meanings.example: The governor gave only a vague outline of his tax plan.
meanings.example_cn: 州长只是含糊地大致说了一下他的税务计划。

meanings.meaning_cn: 健全的；理智的；[临床] 神志正常的
meanings.meaning_en: able to think in a normal and reasonable way
meanings.example: He seems perfectly sane (= completely sane ) to me.
meanings.example_cn: 在我看来他神志完全正常。

meanings.meaning_cn: (Sane)人名；(日)实(姓)；(日)实(名)；(芬、塞、冈、几比、塞内)萨内
meanings.example: No sane person would want to kill a baby.
meanings.example_cn: 神志正常的人不会去杀一个婴儿。

meanings.meaning_en: to succeed in getting information or a reaction from someone, especially when this is difficult
meanings.example: When her knock elicited no response, she opened the door and peeped in.
meanings.example_cn: 敲门没有回应，她便推开门往里张望。

meanings.meaning_en: Invertebrate is also an adjective
meanings.example: ...invertebrate creatures.
meanings.example_cn: ...无脊椎动物。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无脊椎动物；无骨气的人
meanings.meaning_en: a living creature that does not have a  backbone
a serious argument about something that involves many people and continues for a long time
meanings.example: a political controversy
meanings.example_cn: 政治争议

meanings.meaning_cn: 象限；[海洋][天] 象限仪；四分之一圆
meanings.meaning_en: a quarter of a circle

meanings.meaning_cn: 外部的；表面的；[药] 外用的；外国的；外面的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the outside of something or of a person’s body
meanings.example: the external appearance of the building
meanings.example_cn: 大楼的外观

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of a medicine or a drug that you should take
meanings.example: I quite like Jamie in small doses (= in limited amounts but not a lot or often ) .
meanings.example_cn: 如果偶尔在一起的话，我还是蛮喜欢杰米的。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone medicine or a drug

meanings.meaning_cn: 分布不均；分配不当，分配不公
meanings.meaning_en: faulty, unequal, or unfair distribution (as of wealth, business, etc)

meanings.meaning_cn: 季风；（印度等地的）雨季；季候风
meanings.meaning_en: the season, from about April to October, when it rains a lot in India and other southern Asian countries
meanings.example: ...the end of the monsoon.
meanings.example_cn: …雨季的结束。

meanings.meaning_en: the act or process of leaching
meanings.example: Spreading wastewater over fields, and allowing it to leach back through the soil into local waterways, turns out to be a reasonable way to purify it.
meanings.example_cn: 将废水浇灌到田里，这些水经过土壤的过滤后又重新流回当地的水系，这已经被证明是非常合理的污水净化方法。

meanings.meaning_en: if a substance leaches or is leached from a larger mass such as the soil, it is removed from it by water passing through the larger mass

meanings.example: This approach shaved a few tenths of a second off the normal running time, and a few seconds off the large-input version.
meanings.example_cn: 这种方法将正常的运行时间削减了十分之几秒，在较大的输入版本的情况下削减了数秒钟。

meanings.meaning_en: not supporting your country
based on facts
meanings.example: an authentic account
meanings.example_cn: 真实可信的说法

meanings.meaning_en: all the material in the cell of a living thing except the  nucleus (= central part )
meanings.example: They slit open the organisms and suck out the cytoplasm.
meanings.example_cn: 它们撕开海藻那单细胞的机体，将细胞质吸出来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 阻力；电阻；抵抗；反抗；抵抗力
meanings.meaning_en: a refusal to accept new ideas or changes
meanings.example: disease resistance
meanings.example_cn: 抗病能力

meanings.meaning_cn: 由铁道运输；铺设铁路；以捏造不实之罪使入狱
meanings.example: The supplies were sent on the railroad.
meanings.example_cn: 补给经由铁路运送。

meanings.meaning_en: a railway or the railway
meanings.example: a railroad station
meanings.example_cn: 火车站

meanings.meaning_en: to make something seem less important than it really is
meanings.example: White House officials attempted to downplay the President’s role in the affair.
meanings.example_cn: 白宫官员试图为总统在这一事件中的责任开脱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 全体；总效果；全套服装；全套家具；合奏组
meanings.meaning_en: a set of clothes that are worn together
meanings.example: an attractive ensemble
meanings.example_cn: 一套漂亮的服装

meanings.meaning_en: usual
meanings.example: The pans were in their accustomed places.
meanings.example_cn: 那些锅在老地方。

meanings.meaning_en: if a scientist or archaeologist excavates an area of land, they dig carefully to find ancient objects, bones etc
meanings.example: Schliemann excavated the ancient city of Troy.
meanings.example_cn: 谢里曼发掘出特洛伊古城。

meanings.meaning_en: an action taken to prevent another action from having a harmful effect
meanings.example: new countermeasures against terrorism
meanings.example_cn: 对抗恐怖主义的新措施

meanings.meaning_en: Hydrogen is a colourless gas that is the lightest and commonest element in the universe
meanings.example: Water contains hydrogen and oxygen.
meanings.example_cn: 水含有氢和氧。

meanings.meaning_en: the process by which something changes to a worse condition
meanings.example: a life of poverty and degradation
meanings.example_cn: 穷困潦倒的生活

meanings.example: a proprietary brand of insecticide
meanings.example_cn: 专利品牌杀虫剂

meanings.meaning_cn: 所有的；专利的；私人拥有的
meanings.meaning_en: a proprietary product is one that is sold under a  trade name
meanings.example: proprietary software products
meanings.example_cn: 专利软件产品

meanings.meaning_en: to remove unwanted substances from water, air etc by passing it through a special substance or piece of equipment
meanings.example: The water in the tank is constantly filtered.
meanings.example_cn: 鱼缸里的水在不停地被过滤。

meanings.meaning_cn: 滤波器；[化工] 过滤器；筛选；滤光器
meanings.meaning_en: something that you pass water, air etc through in order to remove unwanted substances and make it clean or suitable to use
meanings.example: The ozone layer filters harmful UV rays from the sun.
meanings.example_cn: 臭氧层过滤掉有害的太阳紫外线。

meanings.meaning_en: the system by which a country’s money and goods are produced and used, or a country considered in this way
meanings.example: a successful economy
meanings.example_cn: 发展成功的经济

meanings.meaning_cn: 性格，品质；特性；角色；[计] 字符
meanings.meaning_en: the particular combination of qualities that makes someone a particular type of person
meanings.example: He has a cheerful but quiet character.
meanings.example_cn: 他的性格乐观文静。

meanings.example: Children grow up with a mixture of character traits (= character qualities ) from both sides of their family.
meanings.example_cn: 儿童在成长过程中会把父母亲双方的性格特点都继承下来。

meanings.meaning_en: the subjects that are taught by a school, college etc, or the things that are studied in a particular subject
meanings.example: Languages are an essential part of the school curriculum.
meanings.example_cn: 语言是学校课程中必不可少的部分。

meanings.meaning_en: a building in which Muslims worship
meanings.example: Would you go to church or the synagogue or the mosque?
meanings.example_cn: 你会去教堂，犹太教会，或者清真寺吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a lawyer
meanings.example: ...a prosecuting attorney.
meanings.example_cn: …一位公诉律师。

meanings.meaning_en: a book that tells what has happened in someone’s life, written by someone else
meanings.example: ...recent biographies of Stalin.
meanings.example_cn: …近年的斯大林传记。

meanings.meaning_cn: 选举权；投票；参政权；代祷；赞成票
meanings.meaning_en: the right to vote in national elections
meanings.example: ...the women's suffrage movement.
meanings.example_cn: ...女性选举权运动。

meanings.example: The rumor rocked the whole city.
meanings.example_cn: 谣言使整个城市惊慌不安。

meanings.example: In fact the rumor is without foundation.
meanings.example_cn: 事实上，这个谣传没有根据。

meanings.meaning_en: to turn with a circular movement around a central point, or to make something do this
meanings.example: The Earth rotates on its axis once every 24 hours.
meanings.example_cn: 地球每24小时绕地轴自转一周。

meanings.example: Rotate the pan halfway through the baking time.
meanings.example_cn: 烘烤到一半时把盘子转一下。

meanings.meaning_cn: 神的；神圣的；宗教的；庄严的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to a god or religion
meanings.example: a sacred vow
meanings.example_cn: 神圣的誓言

meanings.meaning_en: the job of being an apprentice, or the period of time in which you are an apprentice
meanings.example: He’s serving an apprenticeship as a printer.
meanings.example_cn: 他现在是一名印刷工学徒。

meanings.meaning_cn: 善良的；有道德的；贞洁的；正直的；有效力的
meanings.meaning_en: behaving in a very honest and moral way
meanings.example: a virtuous man
meanings.example_cn: 品行端正的男子

meanings.meaning_cn: [数] 负的；消极的；否定的；阴性的
meanings.meaning_en: considering only the bad qualities of a situation, person etc and not the good ones
meanings.example: students with a negative attitude to school
meanings.example_cn: 对上学抱消极态度的学生

meanings.meaning_en: an image on a photographic film that shows dark areas as light and light areas as dark, from which the final picture is printed
meanings.example: They have a uniformly negative image of the police.
meanings.example_cn: 他们都对警察印象不好。

meanings.meaning_en: to refuse to accept a proposal or request
meanings.example: Jean rarely sounded so negative about her mother.
meanings.example_cn: 琼很少这么说她母亲不好。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of great anger and shock
meanings.example: The response to the jury’s verdict was one of outrage.
meanings.example_cn: 陪审团的裁决引发了愤慨。

meanings.meaning_cn: 凌辱，强奸；对…施暴行；激起愤怒
meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel very angry and shocked
meanings.example: a sense of moral outrage
meanings.example_cn: 一种义愤填膺的感觉

meanings.meaning_en: a small curved nut
meanings.example: African farmers could effectively control fruit fly damage to citrus fruit, cashew and cocoa crops by using the weaver ant as a method of biological control, according to researchers.
meanings.example_cn: 科学家说，非洲农民可以使用织叶蚁作为一种生物防治手段，有效控制柑橘类、腰果和可可的果蝇虫害。

meanings.meaning_en: money that is paid by a government or organization to make prices lower, reduce the cost of producing goods etc
meanings.example: European farmers are planning a massive demonstration against farm subsidy cuts.
meanings.example_cn: 欧洲的农场主们正在策划一场反对削减农场补贴的大游行。

meanings.meaning_en: Horticultural means concerned with horticulture
meanings.example: ...the John A. Sibley Horticultural Centre.
meanings.example_cn: …约翰A.西布莉园艺中心。

meanings.meaning_cn: 英式橄榄球；拉格比（英格兰中部的城市）
meanings.meaning_en: an outdoor game played by two teams with an  oval (= egg-shaped )  ball that you kick or carry

meanings.example: The peacocks roost in nearby shrubs.
meanings.example_cn: 那只孔雀在附近的灌木丛里栖息。

meanings.meaning_en: if a bird roosts, it rests or sleeps somewhere

meanings.meaning_cn: 织物；布；组织；构造；建筑物
meanings.meaning_en: cloth used for making clothes, curtains etc
meanings.example: our new range of fabrics and wallpapers
meanings.example_cn: 我们新的织物和墙纸系列

meanings.meaning_en: to officially give someone a title etc, especially as a reward for something they have achieved
meanings.example: The constitution also confers large powers on Brazil's 25 constituent states.
meanings.example_cn: 宪法还授予巴西25个成员州极大的权力。

meanings.meaning_en: a member of a jury
meanings.example: The foreman was asked by the clerk whether the jurors had reached verdicts on which they all agreed.
meanings.example_cn: 书记员问陪审团主席是不是陪审员们已作出了全体一致的裁决。

meanings.meaning_en: extracurricular activities are not part of the course that a student is doing at a school or college
meanings.example: Each child had participated in extracurricular activities at school.
meanings.example_cn: 每个孩子都参加了学校的课外活动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 死亡数，死亡率；必死性，必死的命运
meanings.meaning_en: the number of deaths during a particular period of time among a particular type or group of people
meanings.example: Mortality from heart disease varies widely across the world.
meanings.example_cn: 心脏病死亡率世界各地差异很大。

meanings.meaning_cn: 导向的；定向的；以…为方向的
meanings.meaning_en: If someone is oriented toward or oriented to a particular thing or person, they are mainly concerned with that thing or person
meanings.example: It seems almost inevitable that North African economies will still be primarily oriented toward Europe.
meanings.example_cn: 看来可以预见的是，北非经济仍会主要面向欧洲。

meanings.meaning_cn: 调整；使朝向（orient的过去分词）；确定…的方位
主要产品；订书钉；主题；主食
meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of thin wire that is pushed into sheets of paper and bent over to hold them together
meanings.example: staples like flour and rice
meanings.example_cn: 面粉和大米等主食

meanings.meaning_cn: 主要的，大宗生产的；常用的；纺织纤维的
meanings.meaning_en: forming the greatest or most important part of something
admired as one of the best and most important
meanings.example: a prestigious literary award
meanings.example_cn: 享有盛名的文学奖

meanings.meaning_cn: 分析的；解析的；善于分析的
meanings.meaning_en: using scientific analysis to examine something
meanings.example: analytical chemistry
meanings.example_cn: 分析化学

meanings.meaning_cn: [生物] 多细胞的；多空隙的
meanings.meaning_en: consisting of many cells
meanings.example: a multicellular organism
meanings.example_cn: 多细胞有机体

meanings.meaning_en: of or relating to Pythagoras
meanings.example: And I have tried to apprehend the Pythagorean power by which number holds sway above the flux.
meanings.example_cn: 我试图领悟毕达哥拉斯所景仰的数字力量,它支配著此消彼长。

meanings.meaning_en: a follower of Pythagoras
meanings.example: And I have tried to apprehend the Pythagorean power by which number holds sway above the flux.
meanings.example_cn: 我试图领悟毕达哥拉斯所景仰的数字力量，它支配着此消彼涨。

meanings.meaning_cn: 开始（调查）；制定；创立；提起（诉讼）
meanings.meaning_en: to introduce or start a system, rule, legal process etc
meanings.example: We had no choice but to institute court proceedings against the airline.
meanings.example_cn: 我们别无选择，只能对航空公司提起诉讼。

meanings.meaning_en: an organization that has a particular purpose such as scientific or educational work, or the building where this organization is based
an alphabetical list of names, subjects etc at the back of a book, with the numbers of the pages where they can be found
meanings.example: ...the consumer price index.
meanings.example_cn: …消费价格指数。

meanings.meaning_en: if documents, information etc are indexed, an index is made for them
to make sound louder, especially musical sound
meanings.example: an amplified guitar
meanings.example_cn: 带有扩音设备的电吉他

meanings.meaning_en: if you deform something, or if it deforms, its usual shape changes so that its usefulness or appearance is spoiled
meanings.example: Wearing badly-fitting shoes can deform your feet.
meanings.example_cn: 穿不合脚的鞋会使脚变形。

meanings.meaning_cn: 接近，[数]邻近；接近；接近度，距离；亲近
meanings.meaning_en: nearness in distance or time
meanings.example: Here the rich and the poor live in close proximity (= very near to each other ) .
meanings.example_cn: 在这里，富人和穷人比邻而居。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使一致；使和解；调停，调解；使顺从
meanings.meaning_en: if you reconcile two ideas, situations, or facts, you find a way in which they can both be true or acceptable
meanings.example: The possibility remains that the two theories may be reconciled.
meanings.example_cn: 这两种理论仍是有可能协调的。

meanings.meaning_en: if your  spirits (= the way you are feeling, for example happy, sad etc )  or hopes soar, you begin to feel very happy or hopeful
meanings.example: Adam’s smile sent her spirits soaring .
meanings.example_cn: 亚当的微笑让她飘飘然了。

meanings.meaning_en: An infringement is an action or situation that interferes with your rights and the freedom you are entitled to
meanings.example: ...infringement of privacy.
meanings.example_cn: …对隐私的侵犯。

meanings.meaning_en: a circle made from leaves or flowers that you put on the place where a person is buried
meanings.example: The prime minister laid a wreath at the war memorial.
meanings.example_cn: 首相向战争纪念碑献了花圈。

meanings.meaning_cn: 先见，远见；预见；深谋远虑
meanings.meaning_en: the ability to imagine what is likely to happen and to consider this when planning for the future
meanings.example: It was an example of the authorities’ lack of foresight .
meanings.example_cn: 这是当权者缺乏远见的一个例证。

meanings.meaning_en: to be a particular amount when added together
meanings.example: Sheila’s earnings from all sources aggregated £100,000.
meanings.example_cn: 希拉的所有收入总计为10万英镑。

meanings.meaning_en: the total after a lot of different figures or points have been added together
being the total amount of something after all the figures or points have been added together
the main ideas or facts about something, without the details
meanings.example: a research proposal outline
meanings.example_cn: 研究计划梗概

meanings.meaning_en: to describe something in a general way, giving the main points but not the details

meanings.meaning_cn: 血管；叶脉；[地质] 岩脉；纹理；翅脉；性情
meanings.meaning_en: one of the tubes which carries blood to your heart from other parts of your body
meanings.example: the pulmonary vein
meanings.example_cn: 肺静脉

meanings.meaning_cn: 使成脉络；象脉络般分布于
meanings.example: She felt the blood racing through her veins as they kissed.
meanings.example_cn: 他们接吻时她觉得热血沸腾。

meanings.meaning_en: a new interest in something, especially a particular form of art, music etc, that has not been popular for a long period
meanings.example: ...the Renaissance masterpieces in London's galleries.
meanings.example_cn: …伦敦美术馆里文艺复兴时期的杰作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 赎回，赎；勒索赎金；救赎；得赎金后释放
meanings.meaning_en: If you ransom someone who has been kidnapped, you pay the money to set them free
meanings.example: The same system was used for ransoming or exchanging captives.
meanings.example_cn: 同一系统也被用来赎回或交换俘虏。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that is paid to free someone who is held as a prisoner
done with a lot of energy and strong feelings, and sometimes violence
meanings.example: fierce fighting in the city
meanings.example_cn: 城里的激烈战斗

meanings.meaning_en: a brother or sister
meanings.example: Most young smokers are influenced by their friends’ and older siblings’ smoking habits.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数年轻的吸烟者都是因为他们的朋友或者哥哥姐姐有吸烟习惯而受影响的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 讨厌的人；损害；麻烦事；讨厌的东西
meanings.meaning_en: a person, thing, or situation that annoys you or causes problems
meanings.example: The nightclub has been declared a public nuisance.
meanings.example_cn: 那家夜总会已被判定为妨害公众利益。

meanings.meaning_en: helping you to deal with a problem quickly and effectively although sometimes in a way that is not morally right
meanings.example: This solution is politically expedient but may well cause long-term problems.
meanings.example_cn: 这种解决方法是政治上的权宜之计，但会引起长远的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: a quick and effective way of dealing with a problem

meanings.meaning_cn: 出口，排放孔；[电] 电源插座；销路；发泄的方法；批发商店
meanings.meaning_en: a way of expressing or getting rid of strong feelings
meanings.example: ...the largest retail outlet in the city.
meanings.example_cn: …该市最大的零售专卖店。

meanings.meaning_cn: 公正的，明断的；法庭的；审判上的
meanings.meaning_en: Judicial means relating to the legal system and to judgments made in a court of law
meanings.example: ...an independent judicial system.
meanings.example_cn: …一个独立的司法体系。

meanings.meaning_cn: 轶事的；轶事一样的；多轶事的
meanings.meaning_en: consisting of short stories based on someone’s personal experience
meanings.example: His findings are based on anecdotal evidence rather than serious research.
meanings.example_cn: 他的发现依据的是传闻轶事，而不是认真的调查研究。

meanings.meaning_en: if someone or something deflects something that is moving, or if it deflects, it turns in a different direction
meanings.example: He deflected the blow with his forearm.

of better quality and more expensive than other things of the same type

meanings.example: They ran mills, plantations, tanyards, shipyards, and every kind of shop, tavern, and boardinghouse.

the horizontal or x-coordinate of a point in a two-dimensional system of Cartesian coordinates

an animal that is lost or has no home

meanings.example_cn: 在警察部门干了40年后，没有什么能令我非常震惊了。

meanings.example_cn: 我的舞蹈编导总是不断雕琢我，一心将我塑造成完美的舞蹈家。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of money a broker charges

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of flat land that is higher than the land around it
meanings.example: A broad valley opened up leading to a high, flat plateau of cultivated land.
meanings.example_cn: 一个宽阔的山谷展开，通向一片平坦的高原耕地。

meanings.meaning_cn: 数字；手指或足趾；一指宽
meanings.meaning_en: one of the written signs that represent the numbers 0 to 9
meanings.example: Her telephone number differs from mine by one digit.
meanings.example_cn: 她的电话号码跟我的差一个数字。

meanings.meaning_cn: 海盗；盗版；侵犯专利权者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who sails on the seas, attacking other boats and stealing things from them
meanings.example: Computer game pirates cost the industry twenty million pounds a year.
meanings.example_cn: 电脑游戏盗版者每年要给该行业带来两千万英镑的损失。

meanings.meaning_en: to illegally copy and sell another person’s work such as a book, video, or computer program
if you amass money, knowledge, information etc, you gradually collect a large amount of it
meanings.example: For 25 years, Darwin amassed evidence to support his theories.
meanings.example_cn: 25年间，达尔文收集了大量证据来支持自己的理论。

meanings.meaning_en: to control the direction a vehicle is going, for example by turning a wheel
meanings.example: He was steering with only one hand.
meanings.example_cn: 他只用一只手在驾驶。

meanings.meaning_en: a young male cow whose sex organs have been removed
to limit or control the size, amount, or range of something
meanings.example: The new law restricts the sale of hand guns.
meanings.example_cn: 新法规限制手枪的销售。

meanings.meaning_en: a small yellow bird that people often keep as a pet
meanings.example: Tommy: I cleaned the bird cage and the canary disappeared.
meanings.example_cn: 汤米：我刚才打扫鸟笼来着，金丝雀不见了。

meanings.meaning_en: a husband or wife
meanings.example: Spouses were invited to the company picnic.
meanings.example_cn: 配偶受到邀请参加公司的野餐会。

meanings.meaning_en: to say that something will happen, before it happens
meanings.example: Sales were five percent lower than predicted.
meanings.example_cn: 销售额比预期低5%。

meanings.meaning_en: dirty air that looks like a mixture of smoke and  fog  , caused by smoke from cars and factories in cities
meanings.example: Cars cause pollution, both smog and acid rain.
meanings.example_cn: 汽车引起污染，既有烟雾又有酸雨。

meanings.meaning_cn: 夸脱（容量单位）；一夸脱的容器
meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring liquid, equal to two pints. In Britain this is 1.14 litres, and in the US it is 0.95 litres.
meanings.example: As a gift, he brought a big fish and a quart of the largest oysters I had ever seen.
meanings.example_cn: 他给我们带来了一条大鱼还有一夸脱海蛎子，我从来没见过那么大的海蛎子。

meanings.meaning_en: if money that you receive is taxable, you have to pay tax on it
meanings.example: It is worth consulting the guide to see whether your income is taxable.
meanings.example_cn: 值得查一下这本手册看看你的收入是否该纳税。

meanings.meaning_cn: 公文包；文件夹；证券投资组合；部长职务
meanings.meaning_en: a large flat case used especially for carrying pictures, documents etc
meanings.example: an investment portfolio
meanings.example_cn: 投资组合

meanings.meaning_cn: 异国的；外来的；异国情调的
meanings.meaning_en: something that is exotic seems unusual and interesting because it is related to a foreign country – use this to show approval
meanings.example: exotic birds
meanings.example_cn: 外国的奇异鸟类

meanings.meaning_en: a medical condition which makes your knees and other joints stiff and painful
meanings.example: Almost all of them have had some problems with cataracts, they can't hear very well and have osteoarthritis.
meanings.example_cn: 几乎他们中所有的人都一直存在白内障的某些问题，他们听力不好并且有骨关节炎。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal or human that has not yet been born, and has just begun to develop
meanings.example: The system already exists in embryo.
meanings.example_cn: 该体系已具雏形。

meanings.meaning_en: to fill a plane or vehicle with  fuel  before continuing a journey
meanings.example: The plane was refuelled in Dubai.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机在迪拜加过油。

meanings.meaning_en: if a bird, insect, or  helicopter  hovers, it stays in one place in the air
meanings.example: Her younger brother hovered in the background watching us.
meanings.example_cn: 她的弟弟在后面走来走去，观察着我们。

meanings.meaning_cn: 废除；撤销；废止；放弃；否定
meanings.meaning_en: if a government repeals a law, it officially ends that law
meanings.example: The government has just repealed the law segregating public facilities.
meanings.example_cn: 政府刚刚废除了隔离公共设施的法令。

meanings.meaning_en: Repeal is also a noun
meanings.example: Next year will be the 60th anniversary of the repeal of Prohibition.
meanings.example_cn: 明年将是禁酒令废止的60周年。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可行的；能养活的；能生育的
meanings.meaning_en: a viable idea, plan, or method can work successfully
meanings.example: viable seeds
meanings.example_cn: 可存活的种子

meanings.meaning_cn: 专业的；职业的；职业性的
meanings.meaning_en: showing that someone has been well trained and is good at their work
meanings.example: This business plan looks very professional.
meanings.example_cn: 这个商业计划看上去很有专业水平。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who earns money by doing a job, sport, or activity that many other people do just for fun
meanings.example: a more professional approach to work
meanings.example_cn: 更专业的工作方法

meanings.meaning_en: the process of watching something or someone carefully for a period of time
meanings.example: He spent two nights under close observation in hospital.
meanings.example_cn: 他在医院接受了两个晚上的严密观察。

meanings.meaning_cn: 五香的；调过味的；含香料的
meanings.meaning_en: Food that is spiced has had spices or other strong-tasting foods added to it
meanings.example: Every dish was served heavily spiced.
meanings.example_cn: 每道菜端上来都是加过很多香料的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 谴责；告发；公然抨击；通告废除
meanings.meaning_en: to express strong disapproval of someone or something, especially in public
meanings.example: The group denounced the failure by the authorities to take action.
meanings.example_cn: 该团体谴责当局没有采取行动。

meanings.meaning_en: a flat shape with three or more sides

meanings.meaning_cn: 渴望；抱负；送气；吸气；吸引术
meanings.meaning_en: a strong desire to have or achieve something
meanings.example: a high level of political aspiration
meanings.example_cn: 崇高的政治抱负

meanings.meaning_cn: 模糊的，不清楚的；朦胧的；难以清楚辨认的
meanings.meaning_en: an indistinct sound, image, or memory cannot be seen, heard, or remembered clearly
meanings.example: She muttered something indistinct.
meanings.example_cn: 她含含糊糊地嘟哝了句什么。

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that is reliable can be trusted or depended on
meanings.example: a birth control method that is cheap and reliable
meanings.example_cn: 既便宜又可靠的避孕方法

meanings.example: Miller was a quiet and reliable man.
meanings.example_cn: 米勒是个话不多且可靠的人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 个人主义；利己主义；个人特征
meanings.meaning_en: the belief that the rights and freedom of individual people are the most important rights in a society
meanings.example: Capitalism encourages competition and individualism.
meanings.example_cn: 资本主义鼓励竞争，提倡个人主义。

meanings.meaning_en: containing or consisting of salt
meanings.example: saline solution
meanings.example_cn: 盐溶液

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the development of something over a period of time
meanings.example: longitudinal stripes
meanings.example_cn: 竖直条纹

meanings.meaning_en: to obtain something, especially something that is difficult to get
meanings.example: It remained very difficult to procure food, fuel, and other daily necessities.
meanings.example_cn: 当时仍然很难获得食品、燃料和其他日用必需品。

meanings.meaning_en: when an animal kills and eats another animal
meanings.example: We think of these strategies as having been in response to competition and in response to predation.
meanings.example_cn: 我们认为，它们的这种生存策略是为了应对生存竞争和其他生物的捕食。

meanings.meaning_en: a silver-white metal that helps to form teeth, bones, and  chalk  . It is a chemical  element  : symbol Ca
meanings.example: Like fibre, calcium binds with fat molecules and helps flush them out through the intestine.
meanings.example_cn: 像纤维、钙可以和脂肪分子结合，帮助他们彻底的通过肠道。

meanings.meaning_en: If something is affordable, most people have enough money to buy it
meanings.example: ...the availability of affordable housing.
meanings.example_cn: …多数人支付得起的房产的供应。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong hope or wish
meanings.example: female sexual desire
meanings.example_cn: 女性的性欲

meanings.meaning_en: If you desire something, you want it
meanings.example: She had remarried and desired a child with her new husband.
meanings.example_cn: 她再婚了，想跟新任丈夫生一个孩子。

meanings.example: You can borrow the car, providing I can have it back by six o’clock.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以借用我的车，只要6点钟以前还给我就行。

meanings.meaning_en: if you grill something, or if it grills, you cook it by putting it on a flat metal frame with bars across it, above or below strong direct heat
meanings.example: Grill the bacon until crisp.
meanings.example_cn: 将培根烤至酥脆。

meanings.meaning_en: a part of a  cooker  in which strong heat from above cooks food on a metal shelf below
meanings.example: swordfish grilled over charcoal
meanings.example_cn: 炭火烤的剑鱼

meanings.meaning_en: a written set of questions which you give to a large number of people in order to collect information
meanings.example: Teachers will be asked to fill in a questionnaire.
meanings.example_cn: 教师们将被要求填写一份调查问卷。

meanings.meaning_cn: 控制；使掌握；持有；迷住；拥有，具备
meanings.meaning_en: to have a particular quality or ability
meanings.example: Different workers possess different skills.
meanings.example_cn: 不同的工人拥有不同技能。

meanings.meaning_cn: 顶点；[昆] 头顶；[天] 天顶
meanings.meaning_en: the point where two lines meet to form an angle, especially the point of a triangle

meanings.meaning_cn: 高地；高度；[数] 顶垂线；（等级和地位等的）高级；海拔
meanings.meaning_en: the height of an object or place above the sea
meanings.example: The aircraft had reached its cruising altitude of about 39,000 feet.
meanings.example_cn: 那架飞机已经达到了大约三万九千英尺的巡航高度。

meanings.meaning_en: to show or say that something will happen in the future
meanings.example: The revolution foreshadowed an entirely new social order.
meanings.example_cn: 这场革命预示着一种全新的社会秩序将要出现。

meanings.meaning_en: the money that you pay to use a car, television, or other machine over a period of time
meanings.example: Video rental is usually £3.
meanings.example_cn: 录像带的租金通常是3英镑。

meanings.meaning_en: You use rental to describe things that are connected with the renting out of goods, properties, and services
meanings.example: A friend drove her to Atlanta, where she picked up a rental car.
meanings.example_cn: 一个朋友开车送她去了亚特兰大，在那里她租到了一辆车。

meanings.example: Studies in rodents and monkeys have repeatedly shown that exposure to anesthesia at a very young age kills brain cells.
meanings.example_cn: 对于啮齿动物和猴子的研究也多次说明在年龄非常小的时候接受麻醉会杀死脑细胞。

meanings.meaning_cn: [鸟] 园丁鸟；澳洲产的一种鸟
meanings.example: Constructing a brightly colored nest works wonders for the bowerbird.
meanings.example_cn: 造一个色彩明亮的巢会在园丁鸟中产生奇妙的作用。

meanings.meaning_en: a long narrow hole dug into the surface of the ground
meanings.example: Workers dug a trench for gas lines.
meanings.example_cn: 工人们挖了一条沟来铺设煤气管道。

meanings.example: a rubber plantation
meanings.example_cn: 橡胶园

meanings.meaning_cn: 适用于种植园或热带、亚热带国家的
基础设施；公共建设；下部构造
meanings.meaning_en: the basic systems and structures that a country or organization needs in order to work properly, for example roads, railways, banks etc
meanings.example: Some countries lack a suitable economic infrastructure.
meanings.example_cn: 一些国家缺乏适当的经济基础设施。

meanings.meaning_en: a large container for a very hot fire, used to produce power, heat, or liquid metal
meanings.example: It was hot summer and at the edge of the desert it was like a furnace.
meanings.example_cn: 那是一个炎热的夏天，在沙漠的边缘，天热得像火炉一样。

meanings.meaning_cn: 精致的；细腻的；优美的，高雅的；异常的；剧烈的
meanings.meaning_en: extremely beautiful and very delicately made
meanings.example: the most exquisite craftsmanship
meanings.example_cn: 最精美的工艺

meanings.meaning_en: having plenty of money, nice houses, expensive things etc
meanings.example: affluent families
meanings.example_cn: 富裕的家庭

meanings.meaning_en: The affluent are people who are affluent
meanings.example: The diet of the affluent has not changed much over the decades.
meanings.example_cn: 富人的饮食数十年来没怎么变。

meanings.meaning_cn: 委员会；会议；理事会；地方议会；顾问班子
meanings.meaning_en: a group of people that are chosen to make rules, laws, or decisions, or to give advice
meanings.example: the council for civil liberties
meanings.example_cn: 公民自由委员会

meanings.meaning_en: to include a wide range of ideas, subjects, etc
meanings.example: The study encompasses the social, political, and economic aspects of the situation.
meanings.example_cn: 这项研究涵盖了这一局势的社会、政治和经济三方面。

meanings.meaning_en: any of a group of red or yellow pigments, including carotenes, found in plants and certain animal tissues
meanings.example: Lutein is one that's a bright yellow. And lycopene is the carotenoid that makes tomatoes red.
meanings.example_cn: 叶黄素就是其中一种鲜明的黄色，而番茄红素是一种使得西红柿变红的类胡萝卜素。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is immune to a particular disease cannot catch it
meanings.example: Once we’ve had the disease, we’re immune for life.
meanings.example_cn: 我们一旦得过这种病，就获得了终身免疫力。

meanings.meaning_en: the most basic and important quality of something
meanings.example: In essence his message was very simple.
meanings.example_cn: 实质上他想表达的意思很简单。

meanings.meaning_cn: 相当的，相应的；一致的；通信的
meanings.meaning_en: caused by or connected with something you have already mentioned
meanings.example: The war and the corresponding fall in trade have had a devastating effect on the country.
meanings.example_cn: 战争以及由此所导致的贸易量下降对这个国家产生了致命的影响。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of soft thin paper, used especially for blowing your nose on
meanings.example: a box of tissues
meanings.example_cn: 一盒面巾纸

meanings.meaning_cn: 饰以薄纱；用化妆纸揩去

meanings.meaning_en: a formal written agreement between two or more countries or governments
meanings.example: Both sides have agreed to sign the treaty .
meanings.example_cn: 双方都同意签署该条约。

meanings.example: The oblateness tends to decrease since the formation of the earth.
meanings.example_cn: 地球的扁率自形成以来总体趋势在减小。

meanings.example: This is a silly and inaccurate way to think about time, however.
meanings.example_cn: 然而，这是一种愚蠢和错误的看待时间的方法。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the quality or standard of something rather than the quantity
meanings.example: There are qualitative differences in the way children of different ages and adults think.
meanings.example_cn: 不同年龄的儿童和成人在思维方式上有着质的差异。

meanings.meaning_en: a shape that has four straight sides, two of which are usually longer than the other two, and four 90˚ angles at the corners
meanings.example: Suppose the width of a rectangle is x metres.
meanings.example_cn: 设长方形的宽是 x 米。

meanings.meaning_cn: 移动；随季节而移居；移往
meanings.meaning_en: if people migrate, they go to live in another area or country, especially in order to find work
meanings.example: People migrate to cities like Jakarta in search of work.
meanings.example_cn: 人们移居到雅加达这样的城市找工作。

meanings.meaning_en: to persuade someone to do something, especially something that does not seem wise
meanings.example: Patients with eating disorders may use drugs to induce vomiting.
meanings.example_cn: 患有进食障碍的人可使用药物催吐。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of hard material such as wood or stone with straight sides
meanings.example: a wall made of concrete blocks
meanings.example_cn: 由混凝土块砌成的墙

meanings.meaning_en: to prevent anything moving through a space by being or placing something across it or in it

meanings.meaning_cn: 成批的，大块的；交通堵塞的
[数] 除法；部门；分配；分割；师（军队）；赛区
meanings.meaning_en: the act of separating something into two or more different parts, or the way these parts are separated or shared
meanings.example: the traditional division of labour (= the way that particular tasks are shared ) between husband and wife
meanings.example_cn: 夫妻之间传统的分工

meanings.meaning_en: if something is interspersed with a particular kind of thing, it has a lot of them in it
meanings.example: sunny periods interspersed with showers
meanings.example_cn: 晴天，间或有阵雨

meanings.meaning_en: very sad
meanings.example: The music suited her melancholy mood.
meanings.example_cn: 这音乐很适合她的伤感情绪。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of sadness for no particular reason

meanings.meaning_cn: 扰乱；使…混乱；使…心绪不宁
meanings.meaning_en: If something perturbs you, it worries you quite a lot
meanings.example: What perturbs me is that magazine articles are so much shorter nowadays.
meanings.example_cn: 让我不安的是现在杂志文章都短多了。

meanings.meaning_en: a person or company that agrees to do work or provide goods for another company
meanings.example: a roofing contractor
meanings.example_cn: 盖屋顶的承包商

meanings.meaning_cn: 因情况而异的；不一定的；偶然发生的；可能的；依情况而定的；偶然的；[逻]有条件的
meanings.meaning_en: depending on something that may happen in the future
meanings.example: Has the Scottish contingent arrived yet?
meanings.example_cn: 苏格兰代表团到了没有？

meanings.meaning_cn: 分遣队；偶然事件；分得部分；代表团
meanings.meaning_en: a group of people who all have something in common, such as their nationality, beliefs etc, and who are part of a larger group
a structure where  bee s  are kept for producing  honey
meanings.example: If they wanted to eat something sweet, they had tolocate a beehive, smoke out the bees and retrieve the honey, often byclimbing up a tree or chopping it down.
meanings.example_cn: 如果他们想吃某些甜东西，就必须找到一个蜂箱，用烟把蜜蜂熏出来，取出蜂蜜，往往还要爬上树或把蜂窝砍下来。

meanings.meaning_en: all the animals and plants in a particular area, and the way in which they are related to each other and to their environment
meanings.example: ...the forest ecosystem.
meanings.example_cn: …森林生态系统。

meanings.meaning_en: to cover or wrap something or someone up completely
meanings.example: the enveloping darkness
meanings.example_cn: 笼罩四周的黑暗

meanings.meaning_cn: 凄凉的，忧郁的；阴沉的，沉闷的
meanings.meaning_en: if a situation or a place is dismal, it is so bad that it makes you feel very unhappy and hopeless
meanings.example: The future looks pretty dismal right now.
meanings.example_cn: 目前前景似乎相当暗淡。

meanings.example: a dismal, grey afternoon
meanings.example_cn: 一个阴沉灰暗的下午

meanings.meaning_en: to do what someone else wants, or allow something to happen, even though you do not really agree with it
meanings.example: Steve seemed to acquiesce in the decision.
meanings.example_cn: 斯蒂夫看样子默许了这个决定。

meanings.meaning_cn: 身高，身材；（精神、道德等的）高度
meanings.meaning_en: someone’s height or size
meanings.example: Bernard was short in stature, with a large head.
meanings.example_cn: 伯纳德个子矮，头很大。

meanings.meaning_en: one of a set of small, usually round, pieces of glass, wood, plastic etc, that you can put on a string and wear as jewellery
meanings.example: She wore a string of green glass beads around her neck.
meanings.example_cn: 她脖子上戴着一串绿色的玻璃珠子。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone leave a place or building by using force
meanings.example: Two engines cut out and the plane started to eject fuel as it lost height.
meanings.example_cn: 两个发动机突然熄火，飞机在下降的同时开始喷出燃料。

meanings.meaning_en: Planetary means relating to or belonging to planets
meanings.example: Within our own galaxy there are probably tens of thousands of planetary systems.
meanings.example_cn: 在我们所在的银河系中，很可能存在数以万计的行星系。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment consisting of two or more blades that spin around, which makes an aircraft or ship move
to continue to do something, although this is difficult, or other people oppose it
meanings.example: ‘I don’t think it’s right,’ John persisted.
meanings.example_cn: “我认为那不对。”约翰坚持说道。

meanings.meaning_en: done quickly, immediately, or at the right time
meanings.example: Prompt action must be taken.
meanings.example_cn: 必须立即采取行动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 提示；促进；激起；（给演员）提白
meanings.meaning_en: to make someone decide to do something
meanings.example: Prompt payment is requested.
meanings.example_cn: 请立即付款。

meanings.meaning_cn: 提示；付款期限；DOS命令：改变DOS系统提示符的风格
meanings.meaning_en: a word or words said to an actor in a play, to help them remember what to say
meanings.example: a prompt response
meanings.example_cn: 迅速的答复

meanings.meaning_en: An overt action or attitude is done or shown in an open and obvious way
meanings.example: Although there is no overt hostility, black and white students do not mix much.
meanings.example_cn: 虽然没有明显的敌意，但黑人学生和白人学生还是交往不多。

meanings.meaning_en: the distance north or south of the equator(= the imaginary line around the middle of the world ), measured in degrees
meanings.example: The birds breed in northern latitudes.
meanings.example_cn: 这些鸟在北纬地区繁殖。

meanings.meaning_en: connected with, but less important than, something else
meanings.example: a subsidiary hypothesis
meanings.example_cn: 一个附带假设

meanings.meaning_en: a company that is owned or controlled by another larger company
to control the supply of something because there is not enough
meanings.example: Fuel was rationed during the war.
meanings.example_cn: 战争期间，燃油定量供应。

meanings.meaning_en: a fixed amount of something that people are allowed to have when there is not enough, for example during a war
a terrible event in which there is a lot of destruction, suffering, or death
meanings.example: From all points of view, war would be a catastrophe.
meanings.example_cn: 从各个方面来看，战争都会是一场灾难。

meanings.example: These are usually episodic in nature and for the most part are a reflection of the immature central nervous system.
meanings.example_cn: 这些通常在本质中表现为插曲式的，大多数情况下是未成熟的中枢神经系统的反射。

meanings.meaning_cn: 水生的；水栖的；在水中或水面进行的
meanings.meaning_en: living or growing in water
meanings.example: an aquatic plant
meanings.example_cn: 水生植物

meanings.meaning_cn: 水上运动；水生植物或动物

meanings.meaning_en: connected with a particular generation or the relationship between different generations
meanings.example: generational conflict
meanings.example_cn: 两代人之间的冲突

meanings.meaning_en: if a river, lake, or container overflows, it is so full that the liquid or material inside flows over its edges
meanings.example: The drains flooded and water overflowed down the main street.
meanings.example_cn: 下水道被淹，水溢到了大街上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 充满，洋溢；泛滥；超值；溢值
meanings.example: The river had overflowed its banks.
meanings.example_cn: 河水漫堤了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有利可图的；赚钱的；有益的
meanings.meaning_en: producing a profit or a useful result
meanings.example: The advertising campaign proved very profitable.
meanings.example_cn: 事实证明，这次广告宣传活动卓有成效。

meanings.example: This led to the next epochal shift.
meanings.example_cn: 这导致了下一个划时代的转变。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a system, laws, or moral attitudes less strict
meanings.example: ...authoritarian states that have only now begun to liberalize.
meanings.example_cn: …现在刚刚开始放宽限制的独裁国家。

meanings.meaning_cn: 欺骗；从事欺骗性金融活动
meanings.example: The Connells were leading financiers of the Democratic Party in Congress.
meanings.example_cn: 康奈尔家族是民主党在国会中的主要出资方。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who controls or lends large sums of money

meanings.example: All these recipes exemplify my cooking: healthy, delicious and quick.
meanings.example_cn: 所有这些食谱例证了我的饭菜：健康、美味、快捷。

meanings.meaning_en: to draw a line under a word to show that it is important
meanings.example: This tragic incident underlines the need for immediate action.
meanings.example_cn: 这一悲剧事件突显了立即采取行动的必要性。

meanings.meaning_en: a tumour of the epithelium lining the lungs, abdomen, or heart: often associated with exposure to asbestos dust
meanings.example: We extracted data on mesothelioma deaths reported to the World Health Organization mortality database since 1994, when the disease was first recorded.
meanings.example_cn: 我们提取了自1994年该疾病首次记录以来向世界卫生组织死亡数据库报告的间皮瘤死亡数据。

meanings.example: ‘You’re drunk,’ she said bluntly.
meanings.example_cn: “你喝醉了。”她不客气地说。

meanings.meaning_en: to breathe air, smoke etc out of your mouth
meanings.example: Take a deep breath, then exhale slowly.
meanings.example_cn: 深吸一口气，然后慢慢呼出。

meanings.example: “We used to work and eat,” Ms. Devi said, her face etched by decades of blistering winters, her fingers thick from summers of tilling the soil.
meanings.example_cn: 德薇的脸上蚀刻几十年冬天风霜，夏天的劳作使她的手变得又粗有厚，她说：“我们以前就是干活和吃饭。

meanings.meaning_cn: [冶][印刷] 蚀刻（etch的过去分词）
meanings.meaning_en: If a line or pattern is etched into a surface, it is cut into the surface by means of acid or a sharp tool. You can also say that a surface is etched with a line or pattern.
meanings.example: Crosses were etched into the walls.
meanings.example_cn: 十字架被凿刻在了墙上。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone their money back, especially because they are not satisfied with the goods or services they have paid for
meanings.example: I took the radio back, and they refunded my money .
meanings.example_cn: 我把收音机送回去，他们给我退了款。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that is given back to you if you are not satisfied with the goods or services that you have paid for
the fact of being unable to do something
meanings.example: Her inability to concentrate could cause an accident.
meanings.example_cn: 她无法集中注意力可能会导致意外。

meanings.meaning_cn: 心理的；心理学的；精神上的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the way that your mind works and the way that this affects your behaviour
meanings.example: Sleep disorders are a serious psychological problem .
meanings.example_cn: 睡眠障碍是严重的心理疾病。

meanings.meaning_en: Plutonium is a radioactive element used especially in nuclear weapons and as a fuel in nuclear power stations
meanings.example: What about plutonium in the drinking water?
meanings.example_cn: 钚会不会存在于饮用水里呢？

meanings.meaning_en: Viscosity is the quality that some liquids have of being thick and sticky
meanings.example: ...the viscosity of the paint.
meanings.example_cn: ...油漆的黏稠度。

meanings.meaning_cn: 革新的，创新的；新颖的；有创新精神的
meanings.meaning_en: an innovative idea or way of doing something is new, different, and better than those that existed before
meanings.example: an innovative approach to language teaching
meanings.example_cn: 创新的语言教学法

meanings.example: However, the rationale for such initiatives is not, of course, solely economic.
meanings.example_cn: 但是，这些积极行动的根本原因当然不全是出于经济目的。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely great or surprising
meanings.example: The cost was a staggering $10 million.
meanings.example_cn: 费用竟高达 1,000 万美元。

meanings.meaning_en: A previous event or thing is one that happened or existed before the one that you are talking about
meanings.example: She has a teenage daughter from a previous marriage.
meanings.example_cn: 她有个出自前一次婚姻的十几岁的女儿。

meanings.meaning_en: as different as possible from something else
meanings.example: I thought the medicine would make him sleep, but it had the opposite effect.
meanings.example_cn: 我以为这药会让他睡觉，但是它却起了反作用。

meanings.meaning_en: a person or thing that is as different as possible from someone or something else
meanings.example: At the opposite extreme, Ashworth’s style is very simple and modern.
meanings.example_cn: 截然相反的是，阿什沃思的风格非常简单和现代。

meanings.meaning_en: if one thing or person is opposite another, they are facing each other
meanings.example: Bob was quicker than Ed? It’s usually the opposite way round.
meanings.example_cn: 鲍勃比埃德快？通常是反过来的。

meanings.meaning_en: in a position on the other side of the same area

meanings.meaning_cn: 静止的；不活动的；沉寂的
meanings.meaning_en: not developing or doing anything, especially when this is only a temporary state
meanings.example: ...a society which was politically quiescent and above all deferential.
meanings.example_cn: ...一个遵循顺从至上及政治上平静的社会。

meanings.meaning_cn: 认可，支持；背书；签注（文件）
meanings.meaning_en: An endorsement is a statement or action that shows you support or approve of something or someone
meanings.example: This is a powerful endorsement for his softer style of government.
meanings.example_cn: 这是对他的更温和的执政风格的强有力认可。

meanings.meaning_en: of or relating to the north or the north wind
meanings.example: Nahanni National Park Reserve in the Northwest Territories has more than 11, 500 square miles of wilderness that includes ice fields, mountains, alpine tundra, and boreal forest.
meanings.example_cn: 西北地区的纳翰尼国家公园保护区有超过11 500平方英里的荒原，包括冰原，高山，高山苔原，北方森林。

meanings.example: For the rest of the century, rising temperatures are expected to threaten Canada’s boreal forest and its diverse wildlife.
meanings.example_cn: 未来的全球温度上升将会威胁到加拿大的北方森林和它多样化的野生物种。

meanings.meaning_en: the production by a green plant of special substances like sugar that it uses as food, caused by the action of sunlight on  chlorophyll (= the green substance in leaves )
meanings.example: It has at least one gene necessary for photosynthesis—so far it’s the only animal known with this ability.
meanings.example_cn: 它有至少一个基因是光合作用所必需的——到目前为止这是唯一被发现具有此项能力的动物。

meanings.meaning_cn: 添加；增加物；连生；冲积层
meanings.meaning_en: a gradual process by which new things are added and something gradually changes or gets bigger
meanings.example: The script has been gathering editorial accretions for years.
meanings.example_cn: 该剧本经历了多年的修改加工。

meanings.meaning_cn: 成熟的；充分考虑的；到期的；成年人的
meanings.meaning_en: someone, especially a child or young person, who is mature behaves in a sensible and reasonable way, as you would expect an adult to behave
meanings.example: Laura is very mature for her age .
meanings.example_cn: 相对她的年龄来说劳拉是很成熟的。

meanings.meaning_en: to become fully grown or developed
meanings.example: We’re mature enough to disagree on this issue but still respect each other.
meanings.example_cn: 我们都很成熟，尽管我们对此事意见不同，但还是彼此尊重。

meanings.meaning_cn: 孔子的，儒家的；儒家学说的
meanings.meaning_en: Confucian means relating to Confucianism
meanings.example: The government played a major role in promoting Confucian philosophy.
meanings.example_cn: 该政府在推行儒家哲学上担当了一个重要角色。

meanings.meaning_cn: 儒家，儒家学者；孔子的门徒
meanings.meaning_en: A Confucian is someone who believes in Confucianism
meanings.example: It was a preference for naturalness and simplicity that separated the Taoists from the Confucians.
meanings.example_cn: 正是对自然和质朴的偏爱把道家人士从儒家人士中区分开。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something return to its former state or condition
meanings.example: She was hoping that the Mediterranean climate would restore her to full health.
meanings.example_cn: 她希望地中海的气候能使她的身体完全复原。

meanings.meaning_en: the soft fatty substance in the hollow centre of bones
meanings.example: a bone marrow transplant
meanings.example_cn: 骨髓移植

meanings.meaning_cn: 暗指，转弯抹角地说到；略为提及，顺便提到
meanings.meaning_en: If you allude to something, you mention it in an indirect way

meanings.example_cn: 和朋友们一起时，她有时暗示她感到儿子的困境要怪她自己。

meanings.example: In his opinion, benevolence and expressions of gratitude appear to be subtle but powerful ways to bring happiness into one's life and to extend it.
meanings.example_cn: 按他的观点，仁慈和表达感谢之情似乎以微妙但强有力的方式把幸福带到生活中，并使它得到延续。

meanings.meaning_cn: 经销商；批发商；[电] 分配器；分配者；散布者；[电] 配电盘
meanings.meaning_en: a company or person that supplies shops and companies with goods

meanings.example_cn: …西班牙最大的石油产品经销商。

meanings.example_cn: 战争已经影响到了这个国家的经济富足。

meanings.meaning_en: a member of a group of animals which includes human beings and also the animals from whom humans developed

meanings.example_cn: 原始人类中任何一个灭绝的猿物种和我们的关系都比黑猩猩更密切。

meanings.example: H. erectus is generally believed to be the direct ancestor of modern humans and also the first hominid to live in caves and tame fire.
meanings.example_cn: 人们通常认为直立人是现代人的直接祖先，也是第一个生活在洞穴中和学会用火的原始人类。

meanings.meaning_cn: 分离；使分离；劈开；离开；分解
meanings.meaning_en: to divide something into separate parts and share it between two or more people

meanings.example_cn: 我们同意分摊这笔费用。

meanings.meaning_en: a tear or crack in something made of cloth, wood etc
to change something because of new information or ideas

meanings.example_cn: 由于地方上的反对，学院已经修改了计划。

meanings.example: We have revised our estimates of population growth.
meanings.example_cn: 我们已修正了对人口增长的估计。

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of rock or a mountain with a very steep side, often at the edge of the sea or a river

meanings.example_cn: 汽车翻下了悬崖边。

meanings.meaning_en: to enter something and pass or spread through it, especially when this is difficult

meanings.example: The key for corporate America is to embrace the irritant, while the challenge for innovators is to turn irritation into inspiration.
meanings.example_cn: 创新者的挑战在于把刺激物变成灵感，而那些非政府所有制的企业则需要接纳这种刺激物。

meanings.meaning_cn: [医] 刺激物，[医] 刺激剂
meanings.meaning_en: a substance that can make a part of your body painful and sore
an amount of money

meanings.example_cn: 他欠我一大笔钱。

meanings.meaning_en: a very large farm in the western US and Canada where sheep, cattle, or horses are bred
meanings.example: He lives on a cattle ranch in Texas.
meanings.example_cn: 他住在德克萨斯州的一个养牛的大牧场里。

meanings.meaning_en: to find out what illness someone has, or what the cause of a fault is, after doing tests, examinations etc

meanings.example_cn: 他们怎么给你的诊断的？

meanings.meaning_en: a small red sour fruit

meanings.example_cn: 越橘调味汁

meanings.meaning_en: a large mass of snow, ice, and rocks that falls down the side of a mountain
meanings.example: Two skiers were killed in the avalanche.
meanings.example_cn: 两名滑雪者在雪崩中丧生。

meanings.meaning_en: the top or highest part of something pointed or curved

meanings.example_cn: 房顶的尖端

meanings.meaning_en: an official visit to a building or organization to check that everything is satisfactory and that rules are being obeyed
meanings.example: An inspection was carried out at the school.
meanings.example_cn: 有人来学校视察了一遍。

meanings.meaning_cn: 区分；辨别；使杰出，使表现突出
meanings.meaning_en: to recognize and understand the difference between two or more things or people
meanings.example: The light was too dim for me to distinguish anything clearly.
meanings.example_cn: 光线太暗，我什么也看不清。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of small lizard
meanings.example: The only catch is, you might get a house gecko infestation next.
meanings.example_cn: 唯一的风险是，接下来你有可能要面对壁虎成灾噢。

meanings.meaning_en: to choose someone for a position or a job
meanings.example: officials appointed by the government
meanings.example_cn: 政府任命的官员

meanings.meaning_en: goods that are being sold
meanings.example: A range of official Disney merchandise was on sale.
meanings.example_cn: 一系列正版的迪士尼商品在出售。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to sell goods or services using methods such as advertising
meanings.example: They inspected the merchandise carefully.
meanings.example_cn: 他们仔细地检查了商品。

meanings.meaning_en: to get rid of something that you no longer need or want
meanings.example: The company is planning to shed about a quarter of its workforce.
meanings.example_cn: 这家公司正计划裁减约四分之一的人员。

meanings.meaning_en: a small building, often made of wood, used especially for storing things
meanings.example: The magazine is desperately trying to shed its old-fashioned image.
meanings.example_cn: 这份杂志急于摆脱其过时的形象。

meanings.meaning_cn: 给保险；承诺支付；签在下

meanings.meaning_en: the area of a piece of land measured in acres
meanings.example: The Palestinians would balk at that as far too much, even if they got the equivalent acreage back, perhaps adjacent to the Gaza Strip.
meanings.example_cn: 巴基斯坦方对于这个提议望而却步，即便他们能换回同样多的英亩数，还有可能得到加沙地带的邻近区域。

meanings.meaning_en: a large  deer  with long wide  antler s (= horns )  , that lives in cold northern areas
meanings.example: ...a herd of reindeer.
meanings.example_cn: …一群驯鹿。

meanings.meaning_en: to breathe
meanings.example: Because I wish I can respire the natural fresh air during exercise , which is more health and benefit to my body.
meanings.example_cn: 因为我喜欢在运动的同时能呼吸到大自然的清新空气，这样更健康，更有益。

meanings.meaning_cn: 缺陷，缺点；缺乏；不足的数额
meanings.meaning_en: a lack of something that is necessary
meanings.example: They did blood tests on him for signs of vitamin deficiency.
meanings.example_cn: 他们给他做了血检看是否有缺乏维生素的迹象。

meanings.meaning_en: in the direction that the water in a river or stream is flowing
meanings.example: a boat drifting downstream
meanings.example_cn: 顺流漂下的小船

meanings.meaning_en: Downstream is also an adjective
meanings.example: Breaking the dam could submerge downstream cities such as Wuhan.
meanings.example_cn: 毁坏大坝可能会淹没武汉这样的下游城市。

meanings.meaning_en: great anger or hatred
meanings.example: There was real venom in her voice.
meanings.example_cn: 她的声音非常凶狠。

meanings.example: a look of pure venom
meanings.example_cn: 恶毒的表情

meanings.meaning_en: to hit your fingers lightly on something, for example to get someone’s attention
meanings.example: He tapped the table nervously with his fingers.
meanings.example_cn: 他紧张地用手指轻轻地敲打桌子。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment for controlling the flow of water, gas etc from a pipe or container
someone’s mind, or their deepest feelings, which control their attitudes and behaviour
meanings.example: Freud’s account of the human psyche
meanings.example_cn: 弗洛伊德对人类心理的描述

meanings.meaning_cn: 禁止出入港口；禁止或限制贸易；征用或扣押
meanings.meaning_en: to officially stop particular goods being traded with another country
meanings.example: Several countries embargoed arms shipments to Yugoslavia.
meanings.example_cn: 好几个国家对南斯拉夫实行武器禁运。

meanings.meaning_en: an official order to stop trade with another country
shining in the dark
meanings.example: luminous paint
meanings.example_cn: 发光涂料

meanings.meaning_cn: 平等主义，[经] 平均主义
meanings.meaning_en: Egalitarianism is used to refer to the belief that all people are equal and should have the same rights and opportunities, and to actions that are based on this belief
meanings.example: THE idea of the universal middle class is a pervasive expression of American egalitarianism — and perhaps the only one left.
meanings.example_cn: 世界中产阶级是美国平均主义的一种无处不在的表现形式——也许是唯一遗留下来的。

meanings.meaning_en: if animals or people inhabit an area or place, they live there
meanings.example: The woods are inhabited by many wild animals.
meanings.example_cn: 很多野生动物栖居在这片森林里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 铭记于心；使不朽；防腐；使充满香气
meanings.meaning_en: to treat a dead body with chemicals, oils etc to prevent it from decaying
meanings.example: His body was embalmed.
meanings.example_cn: 他的尸体进行了防腐处理。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of rock that looks like black glass
meanings.example: The Texas show includes an obsidian mask that likely traveled to Khara Khorum all the way from Egypt, Lessem says.
meanings.example_cn: 德克萨斯州展出包括了一个黑曜石面具，可能是从埃及被带到哈喇和林来的，莱塞姆说。

meanings.meaning_cn: 短吻鳄（产于美国及中国）；短吻鳄皮革；鳄口式工具
meanings.meaning_en: a large animal with a long mouth and tail and sharp teeth that lives in the hot wet parts of the US and China
meanings.example: alligator shoes
meanings.example_cn: 短吻鳄皮皮鞋

meanings.meaning_cn: 鳄鱼般的；鳄鱼皮革的；鳄鱼皮纹的

meanings.meaning_en: correct or suitable for a particular time, situation, or purpose
meanings.example: The timing of the announcement was particularly appropriate .
meanings.example_cn: 通告发布的时机很合适。

meanings.meaning_en: to take something for yourself when you do not have the right to do this
meanings.example: Where appropriate , I delegate as much work as possible.
meanings.example_cn: 只要合适，我就尽量把工作分派出去。

meanings.meaning_cn: 相称的；同量的；同样大小的
meanings.meaning_en: matching something in size, quality, or length of time
meanings.example: Employees are paid salaries commensurate with those of teachers.
meanings.example_cn: 发给雇员的薪水与发给教师的薪水相当。

meanings.meaning_cn: 细心的；小心谨慎的；一丝不苟的
meanings.meaning_en: doing something very carefully so that nothing is left out
meanings.example: scrupulous attention to detail
meanings.example_cn: 对细节的一丝不苟

meanings.meaning_en: food that is nutritious is full of the natural substances that your body needs to stay healthy or to grow properly
meanings.example: Wholemeal bread is more nutritious than white bread.
meanings.example_cn: 全麦面包比白面包更有营养。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the heart
meanings.example: coronary disease
meanings.example_cn: 心脏病

meanings.meaning_en: to formally or officially tell someone about something
meanings.example: The skipper notified the coastguard of the tragedy.
meanings.example_cn: 船长通知了海岸警卫队这一灾难。

meanings.meaning_cn: 剥夺；损失；免职；匮乏；贫困
meanings.meaning_en: the lack of something that you need in order to be healthy, comfortable, or happy
meanings.example: Sleep deprivation can result in mental disorders.
meanings.example_cn: 缺乏睡眠会引起精神紊乱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 似是而非的；外表美观的；华而不实的；徒有其表的
meanings.meaning_en: seeming to be true or correct, but actually false
meanings.example: a specious argument
meanings.example_cn: 貌似有理的 论据

meanings.meaning_cn: 揭穿；拆穿…的假面具；暴露

meanings.meaning_en: to stop people from opposing the government, especially by using force
meanings.example: The uprising was ruthlessly suppressed.
meanings.example_cn: 起义受到了残酷的镇压。

meanings.meaning_en: a line in the form of a curve that winds around a central point, moving further away from the centre all the time
meanings.example: The maze is actually two interlocking spirals.
meanings.example_cn: 这个迷宫实际上是两个连锁的螺旋体。

meanings.meaning_en: Spiral is also an adjective
meanings.example: ...a spiral staircase.
meanings.example_cn: …一段旋梯。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使成螺旋形；使作螺旋形上升
meanings.meaning_en: to move in a continuous curve that gets nearer to or further from its central point as it goes round
a member of a powerful military class in Japan in the past
meanings.example: As you’d expect from a title like that, there will be a samurai group, numerous katanas and an evil Lord in need of a killing.
meanings.example_cn: 就如你看到片名时期待的那样，影片中会有一个武士团，许多武士刀和一个需要被除掉的邪恶藩主。

meanings.meaning_cn: 开始；继续进行；发生；行进
meanings.meaning_en: to continue to do something that has already been planned or started
meanings.example: Before proceeding further, we must define our terms.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须先定义术语，然后再往下展开。

meanings.meaning_en: The proceeds of an event or activity are the money that has been obtained from it
meanings.example: The proceeds of the concert went to charity.
meanings.example_cn: 音乐会的收入给了慈善机构。

meanings.meaning_cn: 超音速燃烧冲压喷气发动机
meanings.meaning_en: a type of powerful engine that can make an aircraft fly at more than ten times the speed of sound
meanings.example: Earlier this week, the Air Force announced that the X-51 WaveRider, a wingless scramjet, would make its first hypersonic flight.
meanings.example_cn: 本周初，美国空军宣布，超音速燃烧冲压发动机驱动的X-51“驭波者”将进行其首次超音速飞行。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has a lower position and less authority than someone else in an organization
meanings.example: Haig tended not to seek guidance from subordinates.
meanings.example_cn: 黑格不想向下属们寻求指导。

meanings.meaning_en: in a less important position than someone else
something that exists as a single and complete unit
meanings.example: The mind exists as a separate entity.
meanings.example_cn: 思想作为一个独立的实体存在。

meanings.meaning_cn: 矛盾的；不能和解的；不能协调的
meanings.meaning_en: irreconcilable positions etc are so strongly opposed to each other that it is not possible for them to reach an agreement
meanings.example: I find your irresponsible behaviour, coupled with your irreverent attitude, quite irreconcilable with your position.
meanings.example_cn: 我认为你不负责的行为，加上你不敬的态度与你的地位非常不能协调。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is said or done first, to introduce or prepare for something else
meanings.example: After the usual preliminaries , the chairman made his announcement.
meanings.example_cn: 一段例行的开场白之后，主席发布了通告。

meanings.meaning_en: happening before something that is more important, often in order to prepare for it
to describe something correctly and thoroughly, and to say what standards, limits, qualities etc it has that make it different from other things
meanings.example: the ability to define clients’ needs
meanings.example_cn: 确定客户需求的能力

meanings.example: The duties of the post are difficult to define.
meanings.example_cn: 这一职位的职责很难界定。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone some experience or knowledge of a particular problem or situation so that they can notice it and understand it easily
meanings.example: sensitized photographic paper
meanings.example_cn: 感光相纸

meanings.meaning_cn: 抵消，补偿；平版印刷；支管
meanings.example: Cuts in food prices will be offset by direct payments to farmers.
meanings.example_cn: 食品降价将通过直接付款给农民的方式进行补偿。

meanings.meaning_cn: 抵消；弥补；用平版印刷术印刷
meanings.meaning_en: if the cost or amount of something offsets another cost or amount, the two things have an opposite effect so that the situation remains the same

meanings.meaning_cn: 严格的；严厉的；紧缩的；短缺的
meanings.meaning_en: a stringent law, rule, standard etc is very strict and must be obeyed
meanings.example: stringent anti-noise regulations
meanings.example_cn: 严格的防噪音条例

meanings.meaning_en: a way of describing something by referring to it as something different and suggesting that it has similar qualities to that thing
meanings.example: She uses some wonderful images and metaphors in her writing.
meanings.example_cn: 她在作品中用了一些绝妙的比喻和暗喻。

meanings.meaning_en: The ratification of a treaty or written agreement is the process of ratifying it
meanings.example: We welcome this development and we look forward to early ratification of the treaty by China.
meanings.example_cn: 我们欢迎这一进展并期望中国早日批准本条约。

meanings.meaning_en: the state or condition of being central

meanings.meaning_cn: 断言，声明；主张，要求；坚持；认定
meanings.meaning_en: something that you say or write that you strongly believe
meanings.example: She makes very general assertions about marriage in the poem.
meanings.example_cn: 她在诗中的婚姻主张非常笼统。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a television or computer where the picture or information appears
meanings.example: a computer with an 18-inch colour screen
meanings.example_cn: 带18英寸彩色屏幕的电脑

meanings.meaning_en: to do tests on a lot of people to find out whether they have a particular illness
meanings.example: He went on staring at the TV screen .
meanings.example_cn: 他继续盯着电视屏幕看。

meanings.meaning_en: to suggest that something is true, without saying this directly
meanings.example: an implied threat
meanings.example_cn: 隐含的威胁

meanings.meaning_cn: [化学] 衍生物，派生物；导数
meanings.meaning_en: something that has developed or been produced from something else
meanings.example: the derivatives market
meanings.example_cn: 金融衍生品市场

meanings.meaning_cn: 粗糙的；天然的，未加工的；粗鲁的
meanings.meaning_en: not exact or without any detail, but generally correct and useful
meanings.example: a crude estimate of the population available for work
meanings.example_cn: 对劳动力人口的粗略估计

meanings.meaning_en: oil that is in its natural condition, as it comes out of an  oil well  , before it is made more pure or separated into different products
a situation in which two or more people, teams, or companies are competing for something, especially over a long period of time, and the feeling of competition between them
meanings.example: The two players have developed a friendly rivalry .
meanings.example_cn: 这两名选手之间已形成一种友好的竞争关系。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something more beautiful by adding decorations to it
meanings.example: The boat was embellished with carvings in red and blue.
meanings.example_cn: 这艘船饰有红、蓝雕刻。

meanings.meaning_en: a compound consisting of a nucleoside linked to phosphoric acid
meanings.example: The breakthrough permits direct detection of each nucleotide, allowing an entire gene to be sequenced in about an hour.
meanings.example_cn: 这个重大的突破允许直接检测每个核苷酸，可以在大约一小时之内测序整个基因。

meanings.meaning_en: to include something as part of a group, system, plan etc
meanings.example: The new cars will incorporate a number of major improvements.
meanings.example_cn: 这种新型汽车将包含许多重大的改进。

meanings.meaning_cn: 合并的；一体化的；组成公司的

meanings.meaning_en: a group of sheep, goats, or birds
meanings.example: They kept a small flock of sheep.
meanings.example_cn: 他们养了一小群绵羊。

meanings.meaning_cn: 授予专利；取得…的专利权
meanings.meaning_en: to obtain a special document giving you the right to make or sell a new  invention  or product
meanings.example: He patented the idea that the atom could be split.
meanings.example_cn: 他得到了原子可以分裂的这个见解的专利。

meanings.meaning_en: protected by a patent
a special document that gives you the right to make or sell a new  invention  or product that no one else is allowed to copy
someone who buys and sells things such as  share s  in companies or foreign money for other people
meanings.example: a real estate broker
meanings.example_cn: 房地产经纪人

meanings.meaning_cn: 作为权力经纪人进行谈判

meanings.meaning_en: a weapon that can fly over long distances and that explodes when it hits the thing it has been aimed at
meanings.example: a nuclear missile
meanings.example_cn: 核导弹

meanings.meaning_cn: 导弹的；可投掷的；用以发射导弹的

meanings.example_cn: 导弹袭击

meanings.meaning_cn: 加强；增强；（酒）的酒精含量；设防于
meanings.meaning_en: to encourage an attitude or feeling and make it stronger

meanings.example_cn: 她的地位因为选举获胜及经济复苏而得到巩固。

meanings.meaning_cn: 打捞；海上救助；抢救财货；救难的奖金
meanings.meaning_en: when you save things from a situation in which other things have already been damaged, destroyed, or lost

meanings.example_cn: 大规模的抢救行动

meanings.meaning_en: to save something from an accident or bad situation in which other things have already been damaged, destroyed, or lost

meanings.meaning_cn: 生物所能分解的，能进行生物降解的
meanings.meaning_en: materials, chemicals etc that are biodegradable are changed naturally by  bacteria  into substances that do not harm the environment
meanings.example: This carton is made of biodegradable plastic.
meanings.example_cn: 这盒子是用生物降解塑料做的。

meanings.meaning_en: any extinct flying reptile of the order Pterosauria, of Jurassic and Cretaceous times: included the pterodactyls
meanings.example: This is huge for a pterosaur.
meanings.example_cn: 这对翼龙来说非常巨大。

meanings.meaning_en: failure to take enough care over something that you are responsible for

meanings.example_cn: 执行安全程序时的疏忽

meanings.meaning_en: to wash clothes, dishes, vegetables etc quickly with water, especially running water, and without soap
meanings.example: Let me just rinse my hands.
meanings.example_cn: 让我冲个手。

meanings.meaning_cn: 冲洗；漂洗；[轻] 染发剂；染发

meanings.example_cn: 把蔬菜放在冷水龙头下冲洗。

meanings.meaning_cn: 赌运气；冒…的危险，使遭受危险
meanings.meaning_en: to risk losing your money, property etc in an attempt to gain something

meanings.example_cn: 5万美元？我不知道，我只是瞎猜。

meanings.meaning_en: something that may be dangerous, or cause accidents or problems
the part of a plant or tree that grows under the ground and gets water from the soil
meanings.example: tree roots
meanings.example_cn: 树根

meanings.meaning_en: to grow roots

meanings.example_cn: 这些植物会长出一些细根。

meanings.meaning_en: to happen at the same time as something else, especially by chance

meanings.meaning_en: a hole in a ship or aircraft, usually used for loading goods, or the door that covers it

meanings.example_cn: 即使鳄鱼成功地从卵中孵化出来，这些问题也不会终止。

a long firm  pillow  , usually shaped like a tube

meanings.example_cn: 我支持你。

meanings.example: If you have a bolster or several pillows, place your lower back onto the support.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你有一个支撑或者一些枕头，将你的下半身靠在这些支撑上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 种族主义，种族歧视；人种偏见
meanings.meaning_en: unfair treatment of people, or violence against them, because they belong to a different race from your own

meanings.example_cn: 政府已承诺继续打击种族歧视。

meanings.example: This made no sense. All the eggs are fertilized already.
meanings.example_cn: 这可说不通，因为所有的卵都已经受精了。

meanings.meaning_en: an illness in which your  appendix  swells and causes pain

meanings.example_cn: 我得的是阑尾炎吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 信用，信誉；[金融] 贷款；学分；信任；声望
meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement with a shop, bank etc that allows you to buy something and pay for it later
meanings.example: The store agreed to let him have credit.
meanings.example_cn: 商店同意他赊购。

meanings.example_cn: 你的维萨卡信用额度是多少？

meanings.meaning_en: using oxygen

meanings.example_cn: 跑步、游泳及其他有氧健身运动

meanings.meaning_cn: 螺栓，螺钉；闪电，雷电；门闩；弩箭;（布的）一匹，一卷
meanings.meaning_en: a screw with a flat head and no point, for fastening things together
meanings.example: Was this money a bolt from the blue or did you know you were going to get it?
meanings.example_cn: 这是一笔意料之财呢，还是你本来就知道会有的？

meanings.meaning_cn: 筛选；囫囵吞下；（把门、窗等）闩上；突然说出，脱口说出
meanings.meaning_en: to lock a door or window by sliding a bolt across
meanings.example: The pig rose squealing and bolted.
meanings.example_cn: 那头猪尖叫着站起来，飞快地跑开了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 突然地；像箭似地；直立地
meanings.meaning_en: If a person or animal bolts, they suddenly start to run very fast, often because something has frightened them
if you incur a cost, debt, or a fine, you have to pay money because of something you have done
meanings.example: The government had also incurred huge debts.
meanings.example_cn: 政府也已承受了大笔债务。

meanings.meaning_en: to make the meaning of something clearer by giving examples
