meanings.example_cn: 让我举个例子来说明这一点。

meanings.meaning_en: If you say that a place is teeming with people or animals, you mean that it is crowded and the people and animals are moving around a lot
meanings.example: For most of the year, the area is teeming with tourists.
meanings.example_cn: 一年的大部分时间里这个地方都挤满了游客。

meanings.meaning_en: to delay the development of something, or to make something happen more slowly than expected
meanings.example: Cold weather retards the growth of many plants.
meanings.example_cn: 寒冷的天气使许多植物生长滞缓。

meanings.meaning_en: the speed of something that is moving in a particular direction
meanings.example: the velocity of light
meanings.example_cn: 光速

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the movement of blood around your body
meanings.example: the heart and circulatory system
meanings.example_cn: 心脏和血液循环系统

meanings.example: She improved visibly from day to day, until Martin wondered if he was doing right, for he knew that all her compliance and endeavor was for his sake.
meanings.example_cn: 她一天比一天进步了，直到马丁怀疑起自己的做法是否得体。 因为他明白她的这一切迁就和努力都是为了他。

meanings.example: The energy, the faith, the devotion which we bring to this endeavor will light our country and all who serve it -- and the glow from that fire can truly light the world.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在这场努力中所献出的精力、信念与虔诚、将照亮我们的国家以及所有为国家服务的人，而从这一火焰所聚出的光辉必能照明全世界。

meanings.example: What then, is the interest of such an analysis, from a radical left point of view?
meanings.example_cn: 那么，这种关于利益论的分析，是从一个激进的左倾的观点推导出来的吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 基础；激进分子；[物化] 原子团；[数] 根数

meanings.meaning_en: to say words for someone else to write down
meanings.example: Federal funds have to be used as dictated by Washington.
meanings.example_cn: 联邦款项得按照华盛顿规定的途径使用。

meanings.meaning_en: an order, rule, or principle that you have to obey

meanings.meaning_cn: 历史的；史学的；基于史实的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the past
meanings.example: places of historical interest
meanings.example_cn: 历史名胜

meanings.meaning_en: your peers are the people who are the same age as you, or who have the same type of job, social class etc
meanings.example: American children did less well in math than their peers in Japan.
meanings.example_cn: 美国儿童的数学成绩不如日本的同龄儿童。

meanings.meaning_en: to look very carefully at something, especially because you are having difficulty seeing it
meanings.example: Staff members are trained by their peers.
meanings.example_cn: 员工由同事培训。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使隔绝；使隐退；没收，扣押
meanings.meaning_en: to keep a person or a group of people away from other people
meanings.example: The jury were sequestered during the trial.
meanings.example_cn: 审判期间，陪审团被隔离开来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 十中抽一，取十分之一；大批杀害
meanings.example: The population has been decimated by disease.
meanings.example_cn: 疾病导致大量人口死亡。

meanings.meaning_cn: 股份，股票；库存；血统；树干；家畜
meanings.meaning_en: farm animals, especially cattle
meanings.example: We have a huge stock of quality carpets on sale.
meanings.example_cn: 我们备有大量优质地毯出售。

meanings.meaning_en: if a shop stocks a particular product, it keeps a supply of it to sell

meanings.meaning_cn: 福利；幸福；福利事业；安宁
meanings.meaning_en: someone’s welfare is their health and happiness
meanings.example: Our only concern is the children’s welfare.
meanings.example_cn: 我们唯一关心的是孩子们的幸福。

meanings.meaning_cn: 福利的；接受社会救济的
meanings.meaning_en: Welfare services are provided to help with people's living conditions and financial problems
meanings.example: Child welfare services are well established and comprehensive.
meanings.example_cn: 儿童福利机构发展成熟、体系完善。

meanings.meaning_en: if two things or ideas correspond, the parts or information in one relate to the parts or information in the other
meanings.example: The two halves of the document did not correspond.
meanings.example_cn: 这份文件的前后两部分不相符。

meanings.meaning_en: a difference between two statements, beliefs, or ideas about something that means they cannot both be true
meanings.example: apparent contradictions in the defendant’s testimony
meanings.example_cn: 被告证词中的明显矛盾

meanings.meaning_en: not good enough, big enough, skilled enough etc for a particular purpose
meanings.example: inadequate resources
meanings.example_cn: 资源缺乏

meanings.meaning_cn: 有权威的；命令式的；当局的
meanings.meaning_en: an authoritative book, account etc is respected because the person who wrote it knows a lot about the subject
meanings.example: the most authoritative work on English surnames
meanings.example_cn: 有关英语姓氏的最权威著作

meanings.meaning_en: Adolescent is used to describe young people who are no longer children but who have not yet become adults. It also refers to their behaviour.
meanings.example: It is important that an adolescent boy should have an adult in whom he can confide.
meanings.example_cn: 一个青春期男孩应该有一个他能倾吐心声的成年人，这是很重要的。

meanings.meaning_en: a young person, usually between the ages of 12 and 18, who is developing into an adult
To deviate from something means to start doing something different or not planned, especially in a way that causes problems for others
meanings.example: They stopped you as soon as you deviated from the script.
meanings.example_cn: 你一偏离剧本，他们就会叫停。

meanings.meaning_cn: 参议院，上院；（古罗马的）元老院
meanings.meaning_en: the highest level of government in ancient Rome
meanings.example: The Senate is expected to pass the bill shortly.
meanings.example_cn: 预计参议院将很快通过这项议案。

meanings.meaning_cn: 辐射；传播；流露；发射；广播
meanings.meaning_en: if someone radiates a feeling, or if it radiates from them, it is very easy to see that this is how they feel
meanings.example: He radiated calm confidence.
meanings.example_cn: 他身上散发着沉稳自信的气质。

meanings.meaning_en: certain to happen and impossible to avoid
meanings.example: A further escalation of the crisis now seems inevitable.
meanings.example_cn: 危机的进一步升级现在看来已不可避免。

meanings.meaning_en: a doctor who does operations in a hospital
meanings.example: ...a heart surgeon.
meanings.example_cn: …一位心脏外科医生。

meanings.meaning_en: to give up the position of being king or queen
meanings.example: King Alfonso XIII abdicated in favour of his eldest son.
meanings.example_cn: 国王阿方索十三世把王位让给了长子。

meanings.meaning_en: To justify a decision, action, or idea means to show or prove that it is reasonable or necessary
meanings.example: No argument can justify a war.
meanings.example_cn: 没有任何理由能证明一个战争有理。

meanings.meaning_en: a complete range of opinions, people, situations etc, going from one extreme to its opposite
meanings.example: The two articles here represent opposite ends of the spectrum .
meanings.example_cn: 这里的两篇文章代表了两个极端的观点。

meanings.meaning_cn: 多年生的；常年的；四季不断的；常在的；反复的
meanings.meaning_en: a plant that is perennial lives for more than two years
meanings.example: Lack of resources has been a perennial problem since the beginning.
meanings.example_cn: 财力不足从最初起就一直是个问题。

meanings.meaning_en: a plant that lives for more than two years
to name a list of things one by one
meanings.example: I enumerate the work that will have to be done.
meanings.example_cn: 我将必须要做的工作一一列举出来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 持票人；[建] 承木；[机] 托架；送信人；搬运工人
meanings.meaning_en: The bearer of something such as a message is the person who brings it to you
meanings.example: I hate to be the bearer of bad news.
meanings.example_cn: 我讨厌当坏消息的捎信人。

meanings.meaning_en: the relationship in  physics  between time, space, and movement according to Einstein’s  theory
a very small island

meanings.example: arable land (=  land that is suitable for growing crops  )

meanings.meaning_en: a group such as a club or business that has formed for a particular purpose

meanings.meaning_en: able to be divided, for example by a number

meanings.meaning_en: a forthcoming event, meeting etc is one that has been planned to happen soon

meanings.meaning_en: to build something such as a house, bridge, road etc

meanings.meaning_en: an idea formed by combining several pieces of information or knowledge
the act of including someone or something in a larger group or set, or the fact of being included in one

meanings.example_cn: 连同新近加入的成员，总共将有28位代表。

meanings.example: The barb stung her exactly the way he hoped it would.

meanings.meaning_cn: 箭头鱼钩等的倒钩；伤人的话

meanings.meaning_cn: 悖论，反论；似非而是的论点；自相矛盾的人或事

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to tell jokes and make people laugh

meanings.example_cn: 他最初是一名单口喜剧演员。

meanings.example: Whether you stay or leave is a matter of total indifference to me (= I do not care ).
meanings.example_cn: 你是留是走我根本无所谓。

meanings.meaning_en: much smaller than normal

meanings.example_cn: 微型铁路

meanings.example: He looked like a miniature version of his father.

meanings.example_cn: 椅子承受不了特德叔叔的重量，塌架了。

meanings.meaning_en: to give your permission for something or agree to do something

meanings.meaning_cn: 同意；（意见等的）一致；赞成

meanings.meaning_cn: 狭板；梯级；诗句；五线谱表
meanings.meaning_en: the set of five lines on which music is written
half a circle

meanings.example_cn: 他们盘着腿围成半圆坐在一起讲故事。

meanings.meaning_en: a wheel that spins inside a frame and is used for keeping ships and aircraft steady. It can also be a child’s toy.

meanings.example_cn: 坦克中的陀螺仪用于稳定火炮的瞄准系统。

meanings.meaning_cn: 齿轮；装置，工具；传动装置

meanings.meaning_cn: 最小值；最低限度；最小化；最小量

meanings.example_cn: 这是我作为一名人类学家所理解的----人们喜欢讲述自己的故事。

to laugh at a person, idea etc and say that they are stupid

a particular quality in someone’s character

meanings.example_cn: …不使用任何购买的化学品、肥料或杀虫剂的耕作。

dishonest, illegal, or immoral behaviour, especially from someone with power

meanings.meaning_cn: 智力；情报工作；情报机关；理解力；才智，智慧；天分

a sign, remark, event etc that shows what is happening, what someone is thinking or feeling, or what is true

meanings.example_cn: 你能给我透露一下什么时候我能收到回复吗？

meanings.example_cn: 一项由三方参加的体育比赛

meanings.example_cn: 更有可能的是，当我们试图就西方和东方力量进行相对比较的时候，我们将会执着于已过时的词汇。

meanings.meaning_cn: 海关；风俗（custom的复数）；习惯；关税

meanings.example_cn: 现在，越来越多的内科医生例行一种对女性病人从血液中检测维生素D水平的方法，如果低于30毫微克每毫升，就会建议她们服用营养制剂。

meanings.meaning_en: looking new and in perfect condition

meanings.example_cn: 用小薄荷枝装饰。

meanings.meaning_cn: 排水；排水系统；污水；排水面积

meanings.example_cn: 在花盆底下放一把鹅卵石能够帮助排水。

meanings.example_cn: 反应激烈是由丘脑下部控制的。

meanings.meaning_en: very beautiful, bright, and impressive in appearance

meanings.example_cn: 身穿华丽的深蓝色天鹅绒衣服的贝茜正在桌旁徘徊。

meanings.meaning_en: an influence which helps to control or limit something
meanings.example: measures to curb the spread of the virus
meanings.example_cn: 控制病毒扩散的措施

meanings.meaning_en: to control or limit something in order to prevent it from having a harmful effect
nomadic people are nomads

meanings.example_cn: 游牧民

meanings.meaning_en: to stop something or someone that is going from one place to another before they get there
meanings.example: an attempt to intercept drugs being smuggled over the border

meanings.meaning_cn: 拦截；[数] 截距；截获的情报

meanings.example_cn: 他的电话被截听了。

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden increase in the amount or number of something
sound that is too high for humans to hear
meanings.example: investigation of the liver by ultrasound
meanings.example_cn: 对肝脏作的超声波检查

meanings.meaning_en: someone who receives something
meanings.example: ...the largest recipient of U.S. foreign aid.
meanings.example_cn: …最大的美国对外援助接受方。

meanings.meaning_cn: 容易接受的，感受性强的

meanings.meaning_en: to leave your own country in order to live in another country
meanings.example: He emigrated to Belgium.
meanings.example_cn: 他移民去了比利时。

meanings.meaning_cn: [解剖] 腓肠，小腿；小牛；小牛皮；(鲸等大哺乳动物的)幼崽
meanings.meaning_en: the part of the back of your leg between your knee and your  ankle

meanings.example_cn: …一处小腿的伤。

meanings.meaning_cn: （个人独有的）气质，性格，习惯，癖好

meanings.example_cn: 我叔叔的癖好

meanings.meaning_en: a particular way or style of behaving, living or doing something

meanings.example_cn: 把显示器调成256色彩模式。

meanings.example: Requirements volatility stems largely from the rapid pace at which underlying system technologies change; this leads to early obsolescence of designs and components that might otherwise be reusable.
meanings.example_cn: 在底层系统技术以快速的步伐发生变化时，需求变动性就会大量地滋生；这会导致设计和组件的提早退化，否则它们是可重用的。

meanings.meaning_en: the outside edge of something circular
meanings.example: She looked at him over the rim of her glass.
meanings.example_cn: 她沿玻璃杯口看着他。

meanings.meaning_en: to be around the edge of something
If you divest yourself of something that you own or are responsible for, you get rid of it or stop being responsible for it
meanings.example: The company divested itself of its oil interests.
meanings.example_cn: 这家公司从石油生意中抽身。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone or something lose its value or people’s respect
meanings.example: The medical profession has been debased by these revelations.
meanings.example_cn: 这些事被披露后，医学界的声誉受到了损害。

meanings.meaning_en: likely or able to be changed in the future

meanings.example_cn: 临时政府

meanings.example: We accept provisional bookings by phone.
meanings.example_cn: 我们接受电话临时预约。

meanings.meaning_en: when you depend on the help and support of someone or something else in order to exist or be successful
meanings.example: ...the city's traditional dependence on tourism.
meanings.example_cn: …这个城市对旅游业的传统依赖。

meanings.meaning_en: a fat brown bird with a short tail which is shot for sport and food

meanings.example_cn: 以色列王出来是寻找一个虼蚤，如同人在山上猎取一个鹧鸪一般。

meanings.example: He spoke, unequivocally, of the United States’ “unbreakable” commitment to Israel and of why Iran must not have a nuclear weapon.
meanings.example_cn: 他明确地说到，美国对以色列的承诺“牢不可破”，以及为什么伊朗绝不能拥有核武器。

meanings.example_cn: 我选择从事律师职业，有意避开了政治。

meanings.meaning_en: careful, thorough, and exact

meanings.example_cn: 对国防需求的缜密分析

meanings.meaning_cn: 歹徒；罪犯；亡命之徒；被剥夺法律保护者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who has done something illegal, and who is hiding in order to avoid punishment – used especially about criminals in the past

meanings.meaning_en: to stop something from happening, spreading, or developing
If you are disinclined to do something, you do not want to do it

meanings.example_cn: 他不愿谈论自己，尤其是对他的学生们。

meanings.meaning_cn: 海的；海事的；沿海的；海员的

meanings.example_cn: 旧金山几乎失去了所有海运业。

meanings.meaning_cn: 术语；学期；期限；条款；(代数式等的)项
meanings.meaning_en: a word or expression with a particular meaning, especially one that is used for a specific subject or type of language

meanings.example_cn: 教师在学期内经常觉得工作担子过重。

meanings.meaning_en: to use a particular word or expression to name or describe something
to choose something or someone by thinking carefully about which is the best, most suitable etc

meanings.example_cn: 随机挑选出来的一组学生

more important than anything else in a situation, system etc

meanings.example_cn: 英格兰银行在伦敦货币市场中起着关键性的作用。

meanings.meaning_en: to give a plan, piece of writing etc to someone in authority for them to consider or approve

meanings.example_cn: 绝望中，琼斯夫人不得已接受了一次她右膝的手术以减轻疼痛。

meanings.meaning_en: if a process accelerates or if something accelerates it, it happens faster than usual or sooner than you expect

meanings.meaning_cn: 吸收；吸引；承受；理解；使…全神贯注

meanings.meaning_cn: [化学] 挥发性的；不稳定的；爆炸性的；反复无常的

meanings.meaning_en: if a door, gate etc slams, or if someone slams it, it shuts with a loud noise

meanings.example: Dickinson, a bioengineer, has devoted his life's work to the study of insect flight.

meanings.meaning_en: the bones of a person’s or animal’s head

meanings.meaning_cn: 百分比，百分率；部分；百分数

relating to the  stone age (= the period of time thousands of years ago when people used stone tools and weapons )

meanings.example_cn: 他的举动引起了警察的怀疑。

meanings.example_cn: 警方把他作为盗窃嫌疑犯登记入册。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or consisting of money

meanings.example_cn: 沃伦说：“我们已经进行了富有意义的谈判，我相信我们很快就能达成协议。”

meanings.example: That can only be provided by the US.

meanings.example_cn: 虚华的广告

meanings.example_cn: 半小时以后，我在冷却室里站在365号的旁边研究，现在这只是些如此鲜红的肉和琥珀色的脂肪，肌肉时不时的还在抽搐。

meanings.meaning_en: a yellowish brown colour
to become smaller in size, importance, or value, or make something do this

meanings.example_cn: 她的焦虑慢慢减轻了。

meanings.example_cn: 美国一直想在经济和政治上孤立古巴。

meanings.example_cn: 她是一个电视迷，看尽可能多的电视。

meanings.example_cn: 局势难以挽回。

meanings.example_cn: 致命剂量的海洛因

meanings.example_cn: 致命的武器

meanings.example_cn: ...与这些位于西北部的森林里的树木存在共生关系的真菌。

meanings.example_cn: 你的大夫可能会开抗生素。

meanings.meaning_en: land or a field that is covered with grass and is used for cattle, sheep etc to feed on

meanings.example_cn: 大片起伏的山地牧场

meanings.example_cn: 但是上面这个实验所证明的是，虽然我们在智力上可以理解光环效应，但是我们通常不知道它到底什么时候在起作用。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance that can cause  cancer

meanings.example_cn: 石蜡是一种已知的致癌物，而过氧化氢则对消化系统有害。随意丢弃木筷则可能污染水和土壤质量。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the treatment or cure of an illness

meanings.example: The wine is aged in oak barrels.
meanings.example_cn: 这种葡萄酒是用橡木酒桶放陈的。

meanings.meaning_en: a large curved container with a flat top and bottom, made of wood or metal, and used for storing beer, wine etc

meanings.meaning_en: a completely round shape, like the letter O

meanings.meaning_en: the business of selling goods in large quantities at low prices to other businesses, rather than to the general public

meanings.example_cn: 这些纺织品批发给零售商、时装店和其他厂家。

support given by one country or group to another in politics, defence etc

meanings.example_cn: 教会不应该有政治结盟。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who officially agrees to help someone else, or to be responsible for what they do

meanings.example_cn: 如果没有美国担保人就拿不到工作签证。

meanings.meaning_en: to give money to a sports event, theatre, institution etc, especially in exchange for the right to advertise
all the teachers in a university
meanings.example: Both faculty and students oppose the measures.
meanings.example_cn: 教师和学生都反对这些措施。

meanings.meaning_en: to succeed, win, or pass a test by a very small amount so that you only just avoid failure

meanings.meaning_en: of, relating to, or resembling a bird

meanings.example_cn: 科学家们设置了一个鸟类的“卡西诺赌场”，在那里放上两个标志以供鸽子下赌注。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of electronic equipment that allows information from one computer to be sent along telephone wires to another computer

meanings.meaning_en: Radiocarbon is a type of carbon that is radioactive, and which therefore breaks up slowly at a regular rate. Its presence in an object can be measured in order to find out how old the object is.
meanings.example: The most frequently used method is radiocarbon dating.
meanings.example_cn: 最常用的方法是放射性碳定年法。

meanings.meaning_en: the mixture of waste from the human body and used water, that is carried away from houses by pipes under the ground

happening or coming before the time, place, or part mentioned

the difference between the amount you have and the amount you need or expect

meanings.meaning_cn: 食谱；[临床] 处方；秘诀；烹饪法

meanings.example: At this point, such claims have no bearing on the mortgage or housing crisis; they have bearing only on the holders of these securities themselves.

meanings.meaning_cn: 生存能力，发育能力；可行性

if opinions, interests etc diverge, they are different from each other

meanings.example_cn: 一场毫无成效的营销活动

meanings.example_cn: 一个身高六英尺四英寸的壮汉

meanings.meaning_en: a tall  chimney  at a factory or on a ship

meanings.example_cn: 深圳龙岗的另一端是宝安垃圾焚烧厂，它由政府所有的一家公司建造，它的烟囱里几乎没有任何可视烟雾排出。

meanings.meaning_cn: 低技术制造业的；大工厂的

meanings.example_cn: 如今，由煤炭发电厂所排放的煤灰中充斥着许多小“煤胞”，但大部分在逃离工厂的大烟囱前就让污染控制设备给过滤了。

meanings.meaning_en: a short description of a subject or situation that gives the main ideas without explaining all the details

meanings.example_cn: 本书的中心部分是对药物使用的一个历史概述。

meanings.meaning_cn: 难以置信的，不像真实的
meanings.meaning_en: difficult to believe and therefore unlikely to be true
meanings.example: It’s not entirely implausible that a galaxy could be identical to our own.
meanings.example_cn: 某个星系和我们这个星系完全相同并非完全不可能。

meanings.meaning_cn: 意味深长的；雄辩的，有口才的；有说服力的；动人的
meanings.meaning_en: able to express your ideas and opinions well, especially in a way that influences people

meanings.example_cn: 极具说服力的求助呼吁

meanings.meaning_en: very large or greater, more important etc than any other
meanings.example: There is overwhelming evidence that smoking damages your health.
meanings.example_cn: 有难以辩驳的证据表明吸烟有损健康。

meanings.example: An overwhelming majority of the members were against the idea.
meanings.example_cn: 占压倒性多数的成员反对这项主张。

meanings.meaning_en: solid substances that settle at the bottom of a liquid

meanings.example_cn: 一层厚厚的沉积物

meanings.meaning_en: something that is smaller than an atom and has no electrical charge

meanings.example_cn: 原子内的一个中子衰变后会产生一个质子、一个电子和一个中微子。

meanings.meaning_en: Dislocation is a situation in which something such as a system, process, or way of life is greatly disturbed or prevented from continuing as normal
meanings.example: Millions of refugees have suffered a total dislocation of their lives.
meanings.example_cn: 几百万难民饱受生活颠沛流离之苦。

meanings.meaning_en: existing only in small amounts

meanings.example_cn: 他那稀疏的棕色头发

meanings.example_cn: 统一英语拼写的尝试从未成功过。

meanings.meaning_cn: 围攻；包围；围城；不断袭击；长期努力
meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which an army or the police surround a place and try to gain control of it or force someone to come out of it

meanings.example_cn: 这次封锁历时近四个月。

meanings.example: a three-day police siege at a remote country cottage
meanings.example_cn: 警方对一座偏僻村舍历时三天的包围

meanings.meaning_en: to praise or approve of someone or something publicly

meanings.example_cn: 该报获得了“英国新闻奖”的高度褒奖。

meanings.meaning_cn: 深厚的；意义深远的；渊博的

meanings.meaning_en: any of a group of potent hormone-like compounds composed of essential fatty acids and found in all mammalian tissues, esp human semen
meanings.example: If it isn’t, a second dose of the prostaglandin gel is administered.
meanings.example_cn: 如果还没有开始，会开始使用前列腺素的第二种剂量。

meanings.meaning_cn: （将文字材料）译成密码；编码，编制成计算机语言
meanings.meaning_en: to put a message or other information into code

meanings.example_cn: 双方把机密数据写成一种不能被对方直接读懂的密码。

meanings.meaning_cn: 假正经的行为；过分拘谨的言行

meanings.meaning_cn: 闯入者；（为私利）干涉他人事务者；无执照营业者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who enters a place or group where they should not be

meanings.example_cn: 她不想与任何外人分享她的父亲并把我们视为闯入者。

meanings.meaning_en: A subgroup is a group that is part of a larger group
meanings.example: The Action Group worked by dividing its tasks among a large number of subgroups.
meanings.example_cn: 行动小组将任务分配给多个隶属的小组以完成工作。

meanings.meaning_en: to take food or other substances into your body

meanings.example_cn: ...在吃了此物质的鱼身上产生的副作用。

meanings.meaning_cn: 意外事故；伤亡人员；急诊室
meanings.meaning_en: the part of a hospital that people are taken to when they are hurt in an accident or suddenly become ill
meanings.example: Our aim is to reduce road casualties .
meanings.example_cn: 我们的目标是减少交通事故的伤亡人数。

meanings.meaning_en: to pay for something before you need it or use it

meanings.example_cn: 在之前的托管服务上，我们必须要预付一个月的费用。

meanings.meaning_en: to affect someone or something in an unpleasant way, and make them suffer
a nonessential amino acid that occurs in most proteins: a precursor of histamine
meanings.example: The kinase transfers the phosphate from an autophosphorylated histidine and thus (why thus?) is often reversible, with the kinase acting as a phosphatase as well.
meanings.example_cn: 这个激酶从自我磷酸的组氨酸上转移磷酸基，因此（为什么是这样）通常是可逆的，这个激酶也作为一个去磷酸酶。

meanings.meaning_cn: 态度不明朗的；不承担义务的；无明确意义的
meanings.meaning_en: You can describe someone as noncommittal when they deliberately do not express their opinion or intentions clearly
meanings.example: Mr. Hall is non-committal about the number of jobs that the development corporation has created.
meanings.example_cn: 霍尔先生对开发公司已创造的岗位数量含糊其词。

meanings.meaning_en: to get back information that has been stored in the memory of a computer
meanings.example: The new version of the software automatically retrieves digital information.
meanings.example_cn: 新版软件会自动检索数字信息。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has no experience in a skill, subject, or activity

meanings.example_cn: 这门计算机课程非常适合初学者。

meanings.meaning_en: A bellows is or bellows are a device used for blowing air into a fire in order to make it burn more fiercely

meanings.meaning_cn: 至高无上的；有主权的；拥有最高统治权的；不折不扣的；极好的
meanings.meaning_en: having the highest power in a country

meanings.example_cn: 立陶宛和亚美尼亚在维尔纽斯签订了一份互相承认各自为独立主权国家的协定。

meanings.meaning_cn: 君主；独立国；最高统治者
meanings.meaning_en: a king or queen
if two or more facts, ideas etc correlate or if you correlate them, they are closely connected to each other or one causes the other
meanings.example: Attempts to correlate specific language functions with particular parts of the brain have not advanced very far.
meanings.example_cn: 试图把特定的语言功能和大脑特定区域相联系的努力还没有取得很大进展。

meanings.meaning_en: either of two things that correlate with each other

meanings.meaning_cn: 回忆录；研究报告；自传；实录
meanings.meaning_en: a book by someone important and famous in which they write about their life and experiences

meanings.example_cn: 撒切尔夫人刚刚出版了她的回忆录。

meanings.example_cn: 我的叔叔最近做了血管成形术。

meanings.meaning_en: a  memo

meanings.meaning_en: most important

meanings.example_cn: 他那次旅程的首要目的是探访家人。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is in charge of a school

meanings.meaning_cn: 小巷；[航][水运] 航线；车道；罚球区

meanings.meaning_cn: 气味；嗅觉；痕迹；察觉能力

meanings.meaning_cn: 闻到；发觉；使充满…的气味；循着遗臭追踪
meanings.meaning_en: if an animal scents another animal or a person, it knows that they are near because it can smell them
when people of different races, sexes, or religions are kept apart so that they live, work, or study separately
meanings.example: The Supreme Court unanimously ruled that racial segregation in schools was unconstitutional.
meanings.example_cn: 最高法院一致裁定学校实施的种族隔离措施违反宪法。

meanings.meaning_cn: 漠不关心的；无关紧要的；中性的，中立的

meanings.meaning_cn: 使根深蒂固（ingrain的过去分词形式）；生染；就原料染色

meanings.meaning_en: the members of your family who lived a long time ago

meanings.example_cn: 大多数欧洲或者非洲血统的人耳垢是湿的，厚的，有粘性的。

meanings.example: a test that can reveal a teacher’s hidden skills

meanings.meaning_cn: 延伸；扩大；推广；伸出；给予；使竭尽全力；对…估价

meanings.example_cn: 保留收据以备退货之需。

meanings.example: Can you give me a receipt?
meanings.example_cn: 你能给我一个收条吗？

meanings.example_cn: 僧侣们必须遵守保持缄默的誓言。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不均匀的；不平坦的；[数] 奇数的

meanings.example: It's in this period that Milton increasingly begins to adopt, or assume, Saint Peter's confident and denunciatory rhetoric.
meanings.example_cn: 就是在这段时间弥尔顿越来越接受，去采用，圣彼得的有信心的责难似的语言。

meanings.example_cn: ...相对论的提出者。

meanings.example_cn: ...初级读物中使用的语言。

meanings.example_cn: 古董红木书桌

the eggs of a fish or  frog  laid together in a soft mass

meanings.meaning_cn: 产卵；酿成，造成；大量生产

relating to the preparation of a newspaper, book, television programme etc for printing or broadcasting

meanings.example_cn: 公众参与的民主

meanings.meaning_en: improved or better

meanings.example_cn: 白宫急于保护并提高那声望。

meanings.meaning_en: continuing for only a limited period of time

meanings.example_cn: 疼痛的暂时缓解

meanings.example: I’m living with my parents, but it’s only temporary.
meanings.example_cn: 我和父母住在一起，但这只是暂时的。

meanings.meaning_en: to collect grain that has been left behind after the crops have been cut

meanings.meaning_cn: 镶嵌细工的；用拼花方式制成的

meanings.example_cn: …一座曾藏有一批精美的马赛克收藏品的罗马别墅。

the part of a theatre where people sit when watching a play, concert etc

meanings.example_cn: 安德森将要在宪法厅的观众席演唱。

meanings.example_cn: 我们需要解决失业和贫穷这两个实际问题。

meanings.example: There is no real reason to worry.
meanings.example_cn: 没有什么真正的理由需要担心。

meanings.meaning_cn: 化石；僵化的事物；顽固不化的人

meanings.example_cn: 早期爬行动物的化石

meanings.example: Marine sponges have a long fossil record (= their development has been recorded over a long period ) .
meanings.example_cn: 海绵动物留下了漫长的化石记录。

meanings.meaning_en: ordinary and uninteresting and without any imagination

meanings.example_cn: 乏味又缺乏想象力的画作

meanings.example_cn: 一名相当平庸的学生

meanings.meaning_en: a paltry amount of something is too small to be useful or important

meanings.example_cn: 微不足道的一点钱

meanings.example_cn: 我从医是为了治病救人，不是为了预算争吵而浪费时间。

meanings.example: ...as states bicker over territory.
meanings.example_cn: …当国与国之间为领土而争执不断时。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel very unhappy
meanings.example: The thought of taking the exam again depressed him.
meanings.example_cn: 想到要补考，他就心情沮丧。

meanings.meaning_cn: 法人的；共同的，全体的；社团的；公司的；企业的
meanings.meaning_en: belonging to or relating to a corporation
meanings.example: The company is moving its corporate headquarters (= main offices ) from New York to Houston.
meanings.example_cn: 这家公司要把总部从纽约迁到休斯敦。

meanings.meaning_en: a flat square piece of baked clay or other material, used for covering walls, floors etc

meanings.meaning_cn: 木器；木工手艺；[木] 木工业

the state of being curved, or the degree to which something is curved

meanings.example_cn: 而事实上，物质、能量和暗能量在时空中都会产生弯曲。

meanings.meaning_en: The unionization of workers or industries is the process of workers becoming members of unions

meanings.example_cn: 更多工人加入工会带来了对更高工资和更短工作时间的要求。

meanings.meaning_cn: 运输；运输机；狂喜；流放犯
meanings.meaning_en: a system or method for carrying passengers or goods from one place to another

meanings.example_cn: 乘坐公共交通车辆上下班的人

meanings.meaning_en: to take goods, people etc from one place to another in a vehicle
meanings.example: It’s easier to get to the college if you have your own transport (= a car, bicycle etc ) .
meanings.example_cn: 如果你有自己的交通工具，去学院就会更方便。

meanings.meaning_cn: 成熟；化脓；生殖细胞之形成
meanings.meaning_en: the period during which something grows and develops
meanings.example: cell maturation
meanings.example_cn: 细胞的成熟过程

meanings.meaning_en: to disobey or do something against an official agreement, law, principle etc
meanings.example: 34 protesters were arrested for violating criminal law.
meanings.example_cn: 34名抗议者因违反刑法而被逮捕。

meanings.meaning_en: the thing, person, situation etc that people pay special attention to
meanings.example: The focus of recent research has been on environmental issues.
meanings.example_cn: 近期的研究重点是环境问题。

meanings.meaning_en: to give special attention to one particular person or thing, or to make people do this
meanings.example: Eggs became the focus for the food poisoning scare.
meanings.example_cn: 鸡蛋成了食物中毒恐慌的焦点。

meanings.meaning_en: to make people react in a particular way
meanings.example: This announcement fetched a huge cheer from the audience.
meanings.example_cn: 这一宣告博得听众极其热烈的欢呼声。

meanings.meaning_cn: 基质；基片；底层（等于substratum）；酶作用物
meanings.meaning_en: the substance upon which an enzyme acts
meanings.example: As chemical precursors stream onto the surface of a rolling metal or plastic substrate, they react with one another to form a network of nanoparticles.
meanings.example_cn: 各化学母质流向滚动中的金属或塑料基片的表面，他们互相作用，形成一层纳米级微粒网状结构。

meanings.meaning_cn: 容易地；乐意地；无困难地
meanings.meaning_en: quickly, willingly, and without complaining
meanings.example: Jack readily agreed to help.
meanings.example_cn: 杰克爽快地答应帮忙。

meanings.meaning_cn: 逃不掉地；解不开地；解决不了地
meanings.example: Our survival is inextricably linked to the survival of the rainforest.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的生存与雨林的生存息息相关。

meanings.meaning_cn: 植被；植物，草木；呆板单调的生活
meanings.meaning_en: plants in general
meanings.example: Lefkas has an abundance of lush green vegetation.
meanings.example_cn: 莱夫卡斯有葱郁茂盛的植被。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal that eats flesh

meanings.example_cn: 这是一道肉食者们都喜欢的美味素食。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of time when a doctor receives special training in a particular type of medicine, especially at a hospital

meanings.example_cn: 他申请了在加拿大的居住权。

meanings.meaning_cn: 船，舰；[组织] 脉管，血管；容器，器皿
meanings.meaning_en: a ship or large boat
meanings.example: a fishing vessel
meanings.example_cn: 渔船

meanings.meaning_en: In United States history, a homestead was a piece of government land in the west, which was given to someone so they could settle there and develop a farm

meanings.meaning_cn: 酵母；泡沫；酵母片；引起骚动因素
meanings.meaning_en: a type of fungus used for producing alcohol in beer and wine, and for making bread rise
a small amount or piece that is taken from something, so that it can be tested or examined
meanings.example: a blood specimen
meanings.example_cn: 血样

meanings.meaning_en: to give something to people, especially in fixed amounts
meanings.example: a machine for dispensing cash
meanings.example_cn: 取款机

meanings.meaning_cn: 圆锥体，圆锥形；[植] 球果
meanings.meaning_en: a solid or hollow shape that is round at one end, has sloping sides, and has a point at the other end, or something with this shape
meanings.example: ...orange traffic cones.
meanings.example_cn: …橙色的交通锥形警示标。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of moving goods or people from one place to another
meanings.example: baggage that is lost or damaged in transit
meanings.example_cn: 在运输过程中丢失或损坏的行李

meanings.example: transit by air or sea
meanings.example_cn: 空运或海运

meanings.meaning_en: the border of a country
meanings.example: a novel about a family’s struggle on the American frontier
meanings.example_cn: 描写一家人在美国边远地区奋斗的小说

meanings.meaning_en: Exclusively is used to refer to situations or activities that involve only the thing or things mentioned, and nothing else
meanings.example: ...an exclusively male domain.
meanings.example_cn: …一个由男性独占的领域。

meanings.example: Vaughan is confined to a wheelchair .
meanings.example_cn: 沃恩离不开轮椅。

meanings.meaning_en: to keep someone or something within the limits of a particular activity or subject

meanings.meaning_cn: 抿；小口喝；单列直插式组件
meanings.example: She poured more wine and took a sip .
meanings.example_cn: 她又倒了些酒，抿了一小口。

meanings.meaning_en: a change in the  genetic  structure of an animal or plant that makes it different from others of the same kind

meanings.meaning_cn: 有利可图的，赚钱的；合算的
meanings.meaning_en: a job or activity that is lucrative lets you earn a lot of money
meanings.example: Thousands of ex-army officers have found lucrative jobs in private security firms.
meanings.example_cn: 成千上万的退役军官在私人保安公司找到了薪水丰厚的工作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 银河；[天] 星系；银河系；一群显赫的人
meanings.meaning_en: one of the large groups of stars that make up the universe
meanings.example: Astronomers have discovered a distant galaxy.
meanings.example_cn: 天文学家们发现了一个遥远的星系。

meanings.meaning_en: connected with war and fighting
meanings.example: martial music
meanings.example_cn: 军乐

meanings.meaning_cn: 交付；发表；递送；释放；给予（打击）；给…接生
meanings.meaning_en: to take goods, letters, packages etc to a particular place or person
meanings.example: The morning mail has just been delivered.
meanings.example_cn: 早晨的邮件刚送到。

meanings.example: Do you deliver on Saturdays?
meanings.example_cn: 星期六你们送货吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 定做，按客户具体要求制造
meanings.meaning_en: to change something to make it more suitable for you, or to make it look special or different from things of a similar type
meanings.example: a customized car
meanings.example_cn: 按需要定制的汽车

meanings.meaning_cn: 诱惑；引起；冒…的风险；使感兴趣
meanings.meaning_en: to make someone want to have or do something, even though they know they really should not
meanings.example: If you leave valuables in your car it will tempt thieves.
meanings.example_cn: 如果把贵重物品留在车上，会招来小偷的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 多才多艺的；通用的，万能的；多面手的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is versatile has many different skills
meanings.example: a very versatile performer
meanings.example_cn: 多才多艺的表演者

meanings.meaning_en: A carton is a large, strong cardboard box in which goods are stored and transported
meanings.example: Those boxes contain the archives of The New Yorker for the years 1925 to 1980.
meanings.example_cn: 那些纸箱里装着1925年到1980年的《纽约客》杂志存档。

meanings.meaning_cn: 添加；[数] 加法；增加物
meanings.meaning_en: the act of adding something to something else
meanings.example: This is a fine book; a worthy addition to the series.
meanings.example_cn: 这是一本好书——是对这套丛书有价值的增补。

meanings.meaning_en: a flat shape with four straight sides
meanings.example: The quadrilateral takes eight arguments representing the four points of the quadrilateral.
meanings.example_cn: 四边形接受八个参数，代表的是这个四边形的四个顶点。

meanings.meaning_en: having or formed by four sides
meanings.example: They learn the Latin root later, or side, and construct such English words as bilateral and quadrilateral.
meanings.example_cn: 他们又学了拉丁词根later（意思是“边”），并且组成了英语单词bilateral（双边的）和 quadrilateral（四边的）。

meanings.meaning_cn: 产品；结果；[数] 乘积；作品
meanings.meaning_en: something that is grown or made in a factory in large quantities, usually in order to be sold
meanings.example: The London factory assembles the finished product .
meanings.example_cn: 伦敦工厂组装成品。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不可预知的；不定的；出乎意料的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe someone or something as unpredictable, you mean that you cannot tell what they are going to do or how they are going to behave
meanings.example: He is utterly unpredictable.
meanings.example_cn: 他这个人完全让人捉摸不透。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不同的；不相干的；全异的
meanings.meaning_en: consisting of things or people that are very different and not related to each other
meanings.example: a meeting covering many disparate subjects
meanings.example_cn: 涉及许多不同议题的会议

meanings.example: the difficulties of dealing with disparate groups of people
meanings.example_cn: 和不同的人群打交道的难处

meanings.meaning_en: to make a signal to someone with your hand, to show that you want them to come towards you or to follow you
meanings.example: I could see my husband beckoning me.
meanings.example_cn: 我看到我丈夫在向我招手。

meanings.meaning_cn: 工业化前的；未工业化的
meanings.example: Am I suggesting that we should return to the preindustrial mode of production or to nineteenth-century "free enterprise" capitalism?
meanings.example_cn: 我是否在建议我们应回到工业化前的生产模式或回到十九世纪"自由企业"资本主义时期呢？

meanings.meaning_en: a mixture of flour and water ready to be baked into bread,  pastry  etc
meanings.example: He worked hard for his dough.
meanings.example_cn: 他为了赚钱而努力工作。

meanings.meaning_en: denoting a certain position in a sequence of numbers
meanings.example: You can count and order, but not measure, ordinal data.
meanings.example_cn: 对于有顺序的数据，您可以计数和排序，但不能测量。

meanings.example: Net of all the other variables included in the ordinal multiple regression equations, education is not significantly correlated with the frequency of binge drinking and getting drunk.
meanings.example_cn: 与多重序数回归中的其他变量交互比较后发现，受教育水平与狂欢式饮酒及醉酒频率的相关并不显著。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something less painful or difficult to deal with
meanings.example: measures to alleviate poverty
meanings.example_cn: 扶贫措施

meanings.meaning_cn: 债券；结合；约定；粘合剂；纽带
meanings.meaning_en: an official document promising that a government or company will pay back money that it has borrowed, often with  interest
meanings.example: My father put all his money into stock market bonds.
meanings.example_cn: 我父亲把他所有的钱都投在上市债券上。

meanings.meaning_en: if two things bond with each other, they become firmly fixed together, especially after they have been joined with glue
meanings.example: furious trading on the bond market
meanings.example_cn: 债券市场疯狂的交易

meanings.meaning_cn: 变量的；可变的；易变的，多变的；变异的，[生物] 畸变的
meanings.meaning_en: likely to change often
meanings.example: Expect variable cloudiness and fog tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 预计明天多云有雾，天气多变。

meanings.meaning_cn: [数] 变量；可变物，可变因素
meanings.meaning_en: something that may be different in different situations, so that you cannot be sure what will happen
meanings.example: Interest rates can be highly variable.
meanings.example_cn: 利率有时会大幅波动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 初期的；初始的；起初的；发端的
meanings.meaning_en: starting to happen or exist
meanings.example: a sign of incipient madness
meanings.example_cn: 精神失常的早期征兆

meanings.meaning_en: to produce a result, answer, or piece of information
meanings.example: Our research has only recently begun to yield important results.
meanings.example_cn: 直到最近我们的研究才开始取得重要成果。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of profits, crops etc that something produces

meanings.meaning_cn: 批评家，评论家；爱挑剔的人
meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to make judgments about the good and bad qualities of art, music, films etc
meanings.example: Mather was a film critic for many years.
meanings.example_cn: 马瑟做过多年的电影评论家。

meanings.meaning_cn: 霸王；大君主；最高统治者；封建领主
meanings.meaning_en: someone with great power over a large number of people, especially in the past
meanings.example: We really don't want to be the overlords of the Palestinian population.
meanings.example_cn: 我们真的不想当巴勒斯坦人的主子。

meanings.meaning_en: to not do or deal with something that you should do
meanings.example: You can’t go on evading your responsibilities in this way.
meanings.example_cn: 你不能这样继续逃避责任。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of giving a number to each page of a book, magazine etc
meanings.example: It presents the full text on one page, without the pagination links.
meanings.example_cn: 它将全文呈现在同一页面，而不显示页码链接。

meanings.meaning_en: To facilitate an action or process, especially one that you would like to happen, means to make it easier or more likely to happen
meanings.example: The new airport will facilitate the development of tourism.
meanings.example_cn: 新机场将促进旅游业的发展。

meanings.meaning_en: when people are made to join the army, navy etc

meanings.meaning_cn: 发泄；报仇；造成（巨大的破坏或伤害）
meanings.meaning_en: Something or someone that wreaks havoc or destruction causes a great amount of disorder or damage
meanings.example: Violent storms wreaked havoc on the French Riviera, leaving three people dead and dozens injured.
meanings.example_cn: 强风暴对法国里维埃拉造成严重破坏，致使3人死亡、数十人受伤。

meanings.meaning_cn: 功能；[数] 函数；职责；盛大的集会
meanings.meaning_en: the purpose that something has, or the job that someone or something does
meanings.example: The nervous system regulates our bodily functions (= eating, breathing, going to the toilet etc ) .
meanings.example_cn: 神经系统控制着我们身体的功能。

meanings.meaning_en: If a machine or system is functioning, it is working or operating
meanings.example: Bauhaus architects thought that function was more important than form.
meanings.example_cn: 包豪斯学派的建筑师认为功能重于形式。

meanings.meaning_cn: 保证，誓言；抵押；抵押品，典当物
meanings.meaning_en: a serious promise or agree-ment, especially one made publicly or officially
meanings.example: The meeting ended with a pledge to step up cooperation between the six states of the region.
meanings.example_cn: 会议以加快该地区6个州之间合作的承诺结束。

meanings.meaning_cn: 保证，许诺；用……抵押；举杯祝……健康
meanings.meaning_en: to make a formal, usually public, promise that you will do something
moral goodness of character and behaviour
meanings.example: Women have often been used as symbols of virtue.
meanings.example_cn: 女性常被用作美德的象征。

meanings.meaning_en: in a way that is suitable for a particular situation or that is based on what someone has done or said
meanings.example: Katherine still considered him a child and treated him accordingly.
meanings.example_cn: 凯瑟琳仍旧把他当作小孩子，像对待小孩子一样对他。

meanings.meaning_en: a large group of soldiers consisting of several companies (  company  )
meanings.example: Ten hours later Anthony was ordered to return to his battalion.
meanings.example_cn: 10小时之后安东尼被命令回营。

meanings.meaning_en: to examine someone or something very carefully
meanings.example: He scrutinized the document.
meanings.example_cn: 他细阅了这份文件。

meanings.example: She scrutinized his face.
meanings.example_cn: 她细细端详他的脸。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has a serious and permanent mental illness that makes them behave in a violent or criminal way
meanings.example: She was abducted by a dangerous psychopath.
meanings.example_cn: 她被一名危险的精神变态者劫持了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 张力；拉紧；负担；扭伤；血缘
meanings.meaning_en: worry that is caused by having to deal with a problem or work too hard over a long period of time
meanings.example: I couldn’t look after him any more; the strain was too much for me.
meanings.example_cn: 我不能再照看他了，压力太大。

meanings.meaning_en: to try very hard to do something using all your strength or ability
meanings.example: Did you find the job a strain ?
meanings.example_cn: 你觉得这份工作紧张吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to describe or represent something or someone
meanings.example: His most famous painting portrayed the death of Nelson.
meanings.example_cn: 他最著名的画作描绘的是纳尔逊之死。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of companies or organizations who are working together to do something
meanings.example: a consortium of oil companies
meanings.example_cn: 石油公司联合企业

meanings.meaning_en: a strong feeling of trust or confidence in someone or something
meanings.example: People have lost faith in the government.
meanings.example_cn: 人们已失去了对政府的信心。

meanings.meaning_cn: 笨拙的；笨重的；不灵便的；难处理的
meanings.meaning_en: an unwieldy object is big, heavy, and difficult to carry or use
meanings.example: unwieldy bureaucracy
meanings.example_cn: 尾大不掉的官僚机构

meanings.meaning_en: a man who people in the Christian, Jewish, or Muslim religion believe has been sent by God to lead them and teach them their religion
meanings.example: the prophet Elijah
meanings.example_cn: 先知以利亚

meanings.meaning_en: the desire to harm someone because you hate them
meanings.example: James bore her no malice (= did not feel any malice towards her ) .
meanings.example_cn: 詹姆斯对她并无恶意。

meanings.meaning_en: a soft black substance that is a kind of  carbon  , used in pencils, paints, and electrical equipment
meanings.example: The graphite is mixed with clay from Mississippi in which ammonium hydroxide is used in the refining process.
meanings.example_cn: 石墨要与产自密西西比河床的粘土混合，在精炼过程中，还要用到氢氧化铵。

meanings.meaning_cn: 集中；浓缩；全神贯注；聚集
meanings.meaning_en: to think very carefully about something that you are doing
meanings.example: Now please concentrate.
meanings.example_cn: 现在请集中注意力。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance or liquid which has been made stronger by removing most of the water from it
meanings.example: Adrian was finding it difficult to concentrate.
meanings.example_cn: 阿德里安觉得自己很难集中注意力。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money you pay, usually once a year, to receive copies of a newspaper or magazine, or receive a service, or the act of paying money for this
meanings.example: You may cancel your subscription at any time.
meanings.example_cn: 你随时可以取消订阅。

meanings.meaning_en: freedom that a place or an organization has to govern or control itself
meanings.example: campaigners who want greater autonomy for Corsica
meanings.example_cn: 希望科西嘉有更多自治权的活动家

meanings.meaning_en: an affirmative answer or action means ‘yes’ or shows agreement
meanings.example: an affirmative nod
meanings.example_cn: 点头表示同意

meanings.meaning_en: when you decide not to have something valuable, in order to get something that is more important
meanings.example: The minister stressed the need for economic sacrifice.
meanings.example_cn: 部长强调了在经济上作出牺牲的必要性。

meanings.meaning_en: to willingly stop having something you want or doing something you like in order to get something more important
meanings.example: The workforce were willing to make sacrifices in order to preserve jobs.
meanings.example_cn: 雇员为了保住饭碗情愿作出牺牲。

meanings.meaning_en: correct and true in every detail
meanings.example: The brochure tries to give a fair and accurate description of each hotel.
meanings.example_cn: 该手册尽量公正、准确地介绍每一家酒店。

meanings.meaning_cn: 难民，避难者；流亡者，逃亡者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who has been forced to leave their country, especially during a war, or for political or religious reasons
meanings.example: Refugees were streaming across the border.
meanings.example_cn: 难民正涌过边境。

meanings.meaning_en: if a liquid evaporates, or if heat evaporates it, it changes into a gas
meanings.example: Most of the water had evaporated.
meanings.example_cn: 大部分的水都蒸发了。

meanings.meaning_en: easy to see, notice, or understand
meanings.example: Bob ate his lunch with evident enjoyment.
meanings.example_cn: 显然鲍勃吃午饭吃得津津有味。

meanings.meaning_cn: 名义上的；有名无实的；[会计] 票面上的
meanings.meaning_en: officially described as being something, when this is not really true
meanings.example: the nominal head of the rebellion
meanings.example_cn: 这次叛乱名义上的领导人

meanings.example: Their conversion to Christianity was only nominal.
meanings.example_cn: 他们只是名义上皈依了基督教。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has just joined the army, navy, or  air force
meanings.example: New recruits are sent to the Atlanta office for training.
meanings.example_cn: 新成员被送到亚特兰大办事处接受培训。

meanings.meaning_cn: 补充；聘用；征募；使…恢复健康

meanings.meaning_en: to combine with oxygen, or make something combine with oxygen, especially in a way that causes rust
meanings.example: If the organic material decays or is oxidized, it will not form petroleum.
meanings.example_cn: 如果有机物腐烂或氧化，它不会形成石油。

meanings.meaning_en: very careful and thorough
meanings.example: The work had been done with painstaking attention to detail.
meanings.example_cn: 这项工作被一丝不苟地完成了。

meanings.example: Chris described in painstaking detail what had happened.
meanings.example_cn: 克里斯非常详细地描述了所发生的事情。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a formal statement of what is true, especially in a court of law
meanings.example: Mr Molto has agreed to testify at the trial.
meanings.example_cn: 莫尔托先生已经同意出庭作证。

meanings.meaning_en: If a company outsources work or things, it pays workers from outside the company and often outside the country to do the work or supply the things
meanings.example: ...companies that outsource IT functions.
meanings.example_cn: …将信息技术方面的工作外包的公司。

meanings.meaning_en: unrealistic ideas or hopes are not reasonable or sensible
meanings.example: Some parents have totally unrealistic expectations of teachers.
meanings.example_cn: 有些家长对老师抱着完全不切实际的期望。

meanings.meaning_cn: 怀偏见的；有成见的；偏颇的
meanings.meaning_en: having an unreasonable dislike of someone or something, especially a dislike of a group of people who belong to a different race, sex, or religion – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: Some officers were racially prejudiced .
meanings.example_cn: 有些军官有种族歧视。

meanings.meaning_cn: 损害（prejudice的过去分词）；使抱偏见
meanings.example: an intolerant and prejudiced man
meanings.example_cn: 偏狭而有成见的男子

meanings.meaning_en: to continue doing an activity or trying to achieve something over a long period of time
meanings.example: She plans to pursue a career in politics.
meanings.example_cn: 她计划从政。

meanings.example: The next day, we drove inland.
meanings.example_cn: 第二天，我们乘车开往内陆。

meanings.meaning_en: an inland area, city etc is not near the coast
meanings.example: We beached the boat and headed inland.
meanings.example_cn: 我们想使船靠岸，朝内陆方向驶去。

meanings.meaning_cn: 在内地；向内地；向内陆；在内陆
meanings.meaning_en: in a direction away from the coast and towards the centre of a country
meanings.example: In 1985 a glacier buried this shore; since then the ice has retreated a half mile inland.
meanings.example_cn: 1985年，一座冰川在海滨融化，自那时起冰川已经向内陆退缩了半英里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 残忍的；野蛮的，不讲理的
meanings.meaning_en: very cruel and violent
meanings.example: a brutal man
meanings.example_cn: 一个凶残的男人

meanings.meaning_cn: 致使；提出；实施；着色；以…回报
同时代的人；同时期的东西
meanings.meaning_en: someone who lived or was in a particular place at the same time as someone else
meanings.example: Like most of my contemporaries, I grew up in a vastly different world.
meanings.example_cn: 像我同时代的大多数人一样，我在一个非常不同的世界里长大。

meanings.meaning_cn: 当代的；同时代的；属于同一时期的
meanings.meaning_en: belonging to the present time

meanings.meaning_cn: 主要敌人，大敌；撒旦，魔王
meanings.meaning_en: the main enemy
meanings.example: He says Tehran hopes to extend its influence beyond the Middle East, and that it is working with the Taliban, once its archenemy, against coalition forces in Afghanistan.
meanings.example_cn: 他说，德黑兰希望把影响力扩大到中东之外。 伊朗正在跟过去的主要敌人塔利班合作，对抗在阿富汗的联军力量。

meanings.meaning_en: If you say that something is a panacea for a set of problems, you mean that it will solve all those problems
meanings.example: Trade is not a panacea for the world's economic or social ills.
meanings.example_cn: 贸易不是世界经济或社会弊端的万灵丹。

meanings.example: Mr Bailey was looking very spruce in a white linen suit.
meanings.example_cn: 贝利先生穿着白色亚麻套装，看上去很整洁。

meanings.meaning_en: neat and clean
a tree that grows in nor-thern countries and has short leaves shaped like needles

meanings.meaning_cn: 同情的；交感神经的；共鸣的；赞同的；和谐的；合意的
meanings.meaning_en: caring and feeling sorry about someone’s problems
meanings.example: a sympathetic friend
meanings.example_cn: 一个有同情心的朋友

meanings.meaning_cn: 交感神经；容易感受的人
meanings.example: a sympathetic attitude
meanings.example_cn: 一种同情的态度

meanings.meaning_cn: 含义；暗示；牵连，卷入；可能的结果，影响
meanings.meaning_en: a possible future effect or result of an action, event, decision etc
meanings.example: This election has profound implications for the future of U.S. democracy.
meanings.example_cn: 对于美国民主的未来而言，这次选举影响深远。

meanings.example: The new study is the first to provide a window into the way the Pliocene climate varied from year to year, says paleoclimatologist David Lea of the University of California, Santa Barbara.
meanings.example_cn: 来自圣巴巴拉市加州大学的古气象学家David Lea表示，该项研究为探寻上新世气候逐年变化的情况提供了一个突破口，在世界上实属首创。

meanings.meaning_cn: 旅馆；门房；集会处；山林小屋

meanings.meaning_en: to make a formal or official complaint, protest etc
to show your money, success, beauty etc so that other people notice it – used to show disapproval

meanings.example_cn: 富人摆阔，穷人却在大街上饿肚子。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong feeling of sympathy for someone who is suffering, and a desire to help them

meanings.example_cn: 我对这个医生如此缺乏同情心感到震惊。

meanings.meaning_cn: 平方的；正方形的；直角的；正直的

meanings.meaning_en: to multiply a number by itself
a shape with four straight equal sides with 90˚ angles at the corners

meanings.meaning_cn: 女家长；女统治者；女负责人；受人尊敬的妇女
meanings.meaning_en: a woman, especially an older woman, who controls a family or a social group

meanings.meaning_cn: 恶毒的；恶意的；堕落的；有错误的；品性不端的；剧烈的

meanings.example_cn: 对公爵夫人恶毒的人身攻击

meanings.meaning_en: a way of doing something, especially the correct or usual way

meanings.example_cn: 在飞机上，我们听了例行的飞行安全讲解。

meanings.meaning_en: to become worse

meanings.meaning_cn: 公平的，公正的；不偏不倚的

meanings.example_cn: 我们就税收和保险问题提供公充的建议。

meanings.meaning_en: a soft whitish substance that becomes hard when it dries and that is used to fix glass into window frames

meanings.example_cn: 把钉子钉进去，然后再用油灰把洞抹平。

meanings.meaning_cn: 汹涌；大浪，波涛；汹涌澎湃；巨涌

meanings.meaning_en: if a feeling surges or surges up, you begin to feel it very strongly

meanings.meaning_cn: 订阅；捐款；认购；赞成；签署

meanings.example_cn: 我订阅《新科学家》的主要原因是要跟上科学的进步。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance produced naturally by your body which allows sugar to be used for energy

meanings.meaning_en: a system of organization in which people or things are divided into levels of importance

meanings.meaning_en: an essential amino acid; a component of proteins necessary for growth

meanings.meaning_cn: 模糊不清的；引起歧义的

meanings.example: Both the model and the satellite sensor use infrared energy to measure clouds.

meanings.example_cn: 迪奈蒂说：“这是个令人兴奋的结果，这是行星上发现的第一个近红外光谱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 数组，阵列；排列，列阵；大批，一系列；衣服

meanings.example: The infringement exists even if the infringer did not know about the patent.

meanings.meaning_en: liquid waste, especially chemicals or sewage

meanings.meaning_en: to make an animal able to work for people or live with them as a pet

meanings.meaning_en: likely to have been caused by something

meanings.example: The paternity of the child is in dispute.

meanings.meaning_en: a period of 10 years

meanings.example: Gwen lifted the latch and opened the gate.
meanings.example_cn: 格温拉起门闩，把门打开。

meanings.meaning_en: a small metal or plastic object used to keep a door, gate, or window closed
a large animal of the cat family, with yellow fur and black spots, which lives in Africa and South Asia
meanings.example: Her talent was not in gathering information but in analyzing and assessing—a meticulous organizer who plotted and planned with the cunning of a leopard.
meanings.example_cn: 她的才华不在信息收集，而在于分析和评估，一个细微谨慎的组织者，策划着，盘算着有如美洲豹般的狡猾。

meanings.example_cn: 这个小组准备了一束单一类别的中微子即μ介子中微子并将它们由研究所射向位于意大利Gran Sasso地下的实验室来观察有多少变换了种类，τ介子中微子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 适合的，一致的；全等的；和谐的

meanings.example_cn: 他们想在一家与他们自己的价值观相同的组织里工作。

meanings.meaning_en: to provide or issue capital for (a commercial enterprise) in an amount insufficient for efficient operation
to provide or issue capital for (a commercial enterprise) in an amount insufficient for efficient operation
a substance that makes a chemical reaction happen more quickly without being changed itself

meanings.example_cn: 我非常希望这件事终将成为促成变化的催化剂。

meanings.meaning_cn: 强大的；可怕的；令人敬畏的；艰难的

meanings.meaning_en: at an equal distance from two places

meanings.example: The inhibitors of phosphodiesterase -4 inhibit the inflammation reaction by regulating cytokine secretion.
meanings.example_cn: 磷酸二酯酶-4抑制剂通过调节细胞因子而抑制炎症反应。

meanings.example_cn: 美国航空航天局已经启动了一个为期10年的寻找外星生物的项目。

meanings.meaning_en: a course that students can choose to take, but they do not have to take it in order to graduate
A criterion is a factor on which you judge or decide something

meanings.example_cn: 参加的最重要标准就是申请人必须设计并制作自己的作品。

meanings.example: We can reduce this by avoiding homogeneity in group composition.
meanings.example_cn: 在群体成分中避免同质化，可以降低这种可能性。

meanings.meaning_en: to give a particular excuse for your actions

meanings.example_cn: 她告病在家不去上班。

meanings.meaning_cn: 轰动的；耸人听闻的；非常好的；使人感动的

meanings.meaning_cn: 综合的；完整的；互相协调的

meanings.example_cn: 综合公共交通体系

meanings.example_cn: 一大群人聚集在美国大使馆外。

meanings.meaning_en: a repertoire

meanings.meaning_cn: 替罪羊，替人顶罪者；替身

meanings.example: ...a climate where ethnic minorities are continually scapegoated for the lack of jobs and housing problems.
meanings.example_cn: …一种屡屡把缺少工作职位和住房问题归罪于少数族裔的风气。

meanings.meaning_en: frozen raindrops which fall as hard balls of ice

meanings.meaning_cn: 致敬；招呼；向欢呼；猛发；使像下雹样落下（过去式hailed，过去分词hailed，现在分词hailing，第三人称单数hails）
meanings.meaning_en: to call to someone in order to greet them or try to attract their attention
to be a sign that something will happen later

meanings.meaning_en: the part of your mind that tells you whether what you are doing is morally right or wrong

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical substance used to kill insects and small animals that destroy crops

someone who tests people’s eyes and orders glasses for them

meanings.meaning_en: without any excitement, strong opinions, or special character

meanings.meaning_cn: 颠倒（invert的过去分词）；使…反向

meanings.example_cn: 由于网络用户需要即时的满足，这种倒金字塔写作风格，对于网络写作和更好的用户体验是非常重要的。

meanings.meaning_en: the study of the music of different cultures

meanings.example_cn: 美国柏克莱大学研究生安倍玛利亚，在这个公司上班，也从事人种音乐学的研究。

meanings.example_cn: 传统疗法

meanings.example_cn: 他对传统的教育观念提出了质疑。

meanings.meaning_en: the complete opposite of something

meanings.example_cn: 价格和利率之间的反比关系

meanings.example_cn: “不是这样的。”她尖声抗议道。

meanings.meaning_en: to produce a very high and unpleasant sound

meanings.example_cn: 一声刺耳的哨子声

meanings.meaning_en: to produce a very high and unpleasant sound
meanings.example: Fran uttered a shrill scream.
meanings.example_cn: 弗兰发出一声尖叫。

meanings.meaning_en: a well-known phrase or saying, especially one that gives a rule for sensible behaviour

meanings.example_cn: 我相信这句格言：“如果它没坏，不要去修理它。”

meanings.meaning_en: a soft reddish-brown metal that allows electricity and heat to pass through it easily, and is used to make electrical wires, water pipes etc. It is a chemical element: symbol Cu
meanings.example: He offered to do the job for a few coppers.
meanings.example_cn: 他说他来做这份工作，给他几个铜板就行。

meanings.example: His hair has reverted back to its original copper hue.
meanings.example_cn: 他的头发恢复到了原来的铜色。

meanings.meaning_en: to act or act against with equal power or force

meanings.example_cn: 民事诉讼中被告可以减少或消灭对方诉讼请求为目的提出债权抵销的主张。

meanings.meaning_cn: 先发制人，预先阻止；垄断，屯积；领先；占先一步
meanings.meaning_en: to prevent something from happening or prevent someone from doing something by doing something first

meanings.example_cn: 意在预先阻止进一步攻击的措施

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden strong feeling

meanings.example_cn: 一个建设的新高潮正在兴起。
