meanings.meaning_en: if a government or official has a mandate to make important decisions, they have the authority to make the decisions because they have been elected by the people to do so
meanings.example: Matters debated in meetings do not become a mandate automatically.
meanings.example_cn: 会议上讨论的事宜并不能自动成为一项指令。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone the right or power to do something
If you say that someone or something is devoid of a quality or thing, you are emphasizing that they have none of it
meanings.example: I have never looked on a face that was so devoid of feeling.
meanings.example_cn: 我从未见过这样一张完全没有感情的脸。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of starting a new organization or group

meanings.example_cn: 我们现在对行星形成过程的早期阶段有了更多的了解。

meanings.example_cn: 咖啡因会使体内的血管收缩。

meanings.meaning_cn: 品脱；一品脱的量；一品脱牛奶或啤酒
meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring an amount of liquid, especially beer or milk. In Britain a pint is equal to 0.568 litres, and in the US it is equal to 0.473 litres.

meanings.example_cn: 他去小酒馆匆匆喝上一品脱啤酒。

meanings.meaning_en: a trick, especially one which is played on someone to make them look silly

meanings.example_cn: 孩子气的恶作剧

meanings.meaning_en: to dress or decorate showily or gaudily
a white crystalline slightly water-soluble alkaloid that is an isomer of theobromine: it occurs in plants, such as tea, and is used to treat asthma
meanings.example: If you take theophylline, your doctor may advise you to avoid caffeine.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你在服用茶碱类药物，你的医生也可能会建议你远离咖啡因。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a bridge,  arch  etc that goes across from one support to another

meanings.example_cn: 它是一只非常漂亮的蝴蝶，翅膀张开有2英寸宽。

meanings.meaning_en: to include all of a period of time
a young insect with a soft tube-shaped body, which will later become an insect with wings

meanings.example_cn: 这些卵很快孵化成幼虫。

meanings.meaning_en: to succeed in achieving something after trying for a long time

meanings.meaning_en: an insect that eats and destroys wood from trees and buildings

meanings.example_cn: 一个德国男人和女人的脸部特写镜头，他们在谈论白蚁堆美好而必要的共栖性特质，带字幕。

meanings.meaning_cn: 乳草属植物；马利筋属植物；野参类
meanings.meaning_en: a common North American plant that produces a bitter white substance when its stem is broken
a storm that has very strong fast winds and that moves over water

meanings.example_cn: 飓风毁坏了沿海地区的大部分。

meanings.meaning_cn: 共和国的；共和政体的；共和主义的；拥护共和政体的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to or supporting a system of government that is not led by a king or queen
meanings.example: Lower taxes made Republican voters happier with their party.
meanings.example_cn: 更低的税率使共和党选民对该党更加满意。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who believes in government by elected representatives only, with no king or queen

meanings.meaning_cn: 企业；事业；进取心；事业心
meanings.meaning_en: a company, organization, or business

meanings.example_cn: 很大程度上的重叠

meanings.example_cn: 把包折叠起来时，其底部与一边就重合了。

meanings.meaning_en: a clear glass or plastic container for fish and other water animals

meanings.example_cn: 在阿姆斯特丹，姑娘们都站在窗后，光芒四射柔情撩人宛如水族馆玻璃背后脉脉含情的热带鱼。

meanings.meaning_cn: 传染的；传染性的；易传染的
meanings.meaning_en: an infectious illness can be passed from one person to another, especially through the air you breathe

meanings.example_cn: 传染性疾病

meanings.meaning_cn: 残疾；无能；无资格；不利条件

meanings.example: Facilities for people with disabilities are still insufficient.
meanings.example_cn: 供残疾人使用的设施仍然不足。

meanings.meaning_cn: 塑造；使发霉；用模子制作

meanings.example_cn: 塑料被注入模子后， 便放在一边让它慢慢凝结硬化。

meanings.example: Bombastic boasts—"We are positioned to become the preeminent provider of XYZ"—do not constitute a position.
meanings.example_cn: 言过其实的自夸——“我们定位于成为XYZ的卓越供应商”——并不能构建其地位。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to a feeling of great happiness or excitement that is part of a mental illness

meanings.example_cn: 她好像有点激动。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of reptile that has four legs and a long tail
discussion in order to reach an agreement about a sale, contract etc
meanings.example: The 4% pay raise was the result of some hard bargaining .
meanings.example_cn: 4%的加薪是经过一番艰苦谈判后才取得的结果。

meanings.meaning_en: When people bargain with each other, they discuss what each of them will do, pay, or receive
meanings.example: They prefer to bargain with individual clients, for cash.
meanings.example_cn: 他们更愿意同个人客户洽谈，做现金交易。

meanings.meaning_en: to pretend to have a particular feeling or to be ill, asleep etc
meanings.example: Feigning a headache, I went upstairs to my room.
meanings.example_cn: 我假装头痛，上楼到自己房间去了。

meanings.meaning_en: If you describe an event or situation as calamitous, you mean it is very unfortunate or serious

meanings.example_cn: ...该国家的悲惨境况。

meanings.meaning_en: a mass of gas and dust among the stars, which often appears as a bright cloud in the sky at night
to form an opinion that something is probably true because of information that you have
meanings.example: I inferred from what she said that you have not been well.
meanings.example_cn: 我从她的话里推断出你身体一直不大好。

meanings.meaning_cn: 微妙的；精细的；敏感的；狡猾的；稀薄的
meanings.meaning_en: not easy to notice or understand unless you pay careful attention
meanings.example: The pictures are similar, but there are subtle differences between them.
meanings.example_cn: 这些图片很相似，但它们之间有细微的差别。

meanings.example: Over 500 people died during last year’s flu epidemic.
meanings.example_cn: 去年流感大暴发期间有五百多人死亡。

meanings.meaning_cn: 传染病；流行病；风尚等的流行
meanings.meaning_en: a large number of cases of a disease that happen at the same time
said or written at the beginning of a book, speech etc in order to explain what it is about
meanings.example: as the chairman said in his introductory remarks
meanings.example_cn: 正如主席在开场白中所说的

meanings.example: a sudden outbreak of typhoid
meanings.example_cn: 伤寒的突然爆发

meanings.meaning_en: a serious infectious disease that is caused by dirty food or drink

meanings.meaning_cn: 空间的；存在于空间的；受空间条件限制的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the position, size, shape etc of things
meanings.example: ...the spatial distribution of black employment and population in South Africa.
meanings.example_cn: …南非黑人就业和人口的空间分布。

meanings.meaning_en: if two lines or roads intersect, they meet or go across each other
meanings.example: Streets usually intersect at right angles.
meanings.example_cn: 街道通常成直角相交。

meanings.meaning_cn: 被动的，消极的；被动语态的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is passive tends to accept things that happen to them or things that people say to them, without taking any action
meanings.example: Kathy seems to take a very passive role in the relationship.
meanings.example_cn: 凯茜在这一关系中似乎扮演着十分被动的角色。

meanings.meaning_en: the passive form of a verb, for example ‘was destroyed’ in the sentence ‘The building was destroyed during the war.’
meanings.example: their passive acceptance of their fate
meanings.example_cn: 他们对命运的消极接受

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately get involved in a situation where you are not wanted or needed
meanings.example: My daughter-in-law said that I was interfering, but I was only trying to help.
meanings.example_cn: 我的儿媳说我多管闲事，但我只是想帮忙。

meanings.meaning_en: to prevent someone or something from continuing - used especially in news reports
meanings.example: The government has failed to halt economic decline.
meanings.example_cn: 政府没能阻止经济衰退。

meanings.meaning_en: a stop or pause
meanings.example: Safety concerns have led them to halt work on the dam.
meanings.example_cn: 出于安全方面的顾虑，他们已经停止水坝的施工。

meanings.meaning_cn: 操纵；操作；巧妙地处理；篡改
meanings.meaning_en: to make someone think and behave exactly as you want them to, by skilfully deceiving or influencing them
meanings.example: He was one of those men who manipulated people.
meanings.example_cn: 他是那种要摆布别人的人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 微妙的；精美的，雅致的；柔和的；易碎的；纤弱的；清淡可口的
meanings.meaning_en: needing to be dealt with carefully or sensitively in order to avoid problems or failure
meanings.example: There’s something I have to speak to you about – it’s a delicate matter .
meanings.example_cn: 我有件事要跟你讲——是一件需要谨慎处理的事。

meanings.meaning_en: to offer to pay a particular price for goods, especially in an  auction
meanings.example: She wanted to bid for it.
meanings.example_cn: 她想出价买下它。

meanings.meaning_en: an offer to pay a particular price for something, especially at an  auction
consecutive numbers or periods of time follow one after the other without any interruptions
meanings.example: It had rained for four consecutive days.
meanings.example_cn: 雨接连下了四天。

meanings.meaning_cn: 同盟国；伙伴；同盟者；助手
meanings.meaning_en: a country that agrees to help or support another country in a war
meanings.example: a meeting of the European allies
meanings.example_cn: 欧洲盟国会议

meanings.meaning_en: If you ally yourself with someone or something, you give your support to them
meanings.example: He will have no choice but to ally himself with the new movement.
meanings.example_cn: 他将别无选择，只能与这个新运动结盟。

meanings.meaning_cn: [数][计] 序列；顺序；续发事件
meanings.meaning_en: the order that something happens or exists in, or the order it is supposed to happen or exist in
meanings.example: Be careful to perform the actions in the correct sequence .
meanings.example_cn: 注意要按正确的顺序来完成动作。

meanings.meaning_en: the main subject or idea in a piece of writing, speech, film etc
meanings.example: The book’s theme is the conflict between love and duty.
meanings.example_cn: 本书的主题是爱与责任之间的冲突。

meanings.example: Nature is a recurrent theme (= a theme that appears repeatedly ) in Frost’s poetry.
meanings.example_cn: 大自然是弗罗斯特诗作中反复出现的一个主题。

meanings.meaning_en: if an unpleasant feeling engulfs you, you feel it very strongly
meanings.example: despair so great it threatened to engulf him
meanings.example_cn: 几乎要将他压垮的绝望情绪

meanings.meaning_cn: 骨架，骨骼；纲要；骨瘦如柴的人
meanings.meaning_en: the most important parts of something, to which more detail can be added later

Fetal is used to describe something that relates to or is like a fetus

a short piece of thread that has been sewn into a piece of cloth, or the action of the thread going into and out of the cloth

meanings.meaning_en: happening before the natural or proper time

meanings.example_cn: 计算机供应过量

meanings.example: These comprise asphalt, tar and waxes.
meanings.example_cn: 其中包括沥青，焦油和蜡。

meanings.example: I have told them that I run in the bike lanes of roads because asphalt is softer than concrete.
meanings.example_cn: 我告诉他们我常跑自行车道，因为我能感觉出柏油路面比混凝土路面更加柔软。

meanings.meaning_cn: [有化] 乙醇，[有化] 酒精

meanings.example_cn: 但是这场争论的意义远远不止于乙醇问题。

meanings.example_cn: …教授读、写、算的基本知识。

the very small forms of plant and animal life that live in water, especially the sea, and are eaten by fish

meanings.example_cn: ...它通常赖以为食的浮游生物和其他微生物。

feeling uncomfortable or nervous and worrying about what people think of you, for example because you have made a silly mistake, or because you have to talk or sing in public

meanings.example_cn: 我们要是请洛丽唱歌，她就会难为情。

meanings.example_cn: 经济刺激因素

meanings.example_cn: 约瑟夫不同于人们一般印象中的警察形象。

meanings.meaning_en: a very large flesh-eating  dinosaur
to put paper or cloth over something to cover it

破坏；失事；残骸；失去健康的人
meanings.meaning_en: a ship that has sunk

meanings.example_cn: 他们把他从失事的车辆中拖出来时，他还活着。

meanings.example_cn: 刚果共和国发生急性脊髓灰质炎疫情，已发生120例弛缓性麻痹病例和58例死亡。

meanings.example_cn: 员工用毒药来消灭鼹鼠和野兔。

meanings.meaning_en: food for farm animals

meanings.example_cn: …马的饲料。

meanings.meaning_en: physical or mental strength that lets you continue doing something for a long time without getting tired

meanings.example_cn: 由于在发酵过程中产生的乳酸菌抑制了有害菌的生长，所以泡菜有抗生素作用。

meanings.example_cn: 这是这些酶首次特征性描述。

meanings.example: Pour a little glue into some shallow containers, dip cotton balls in the glue and then stick onto the paper - you have a snow mural!
meanings.example_cn: 在一个浅的容器里倒一点胶水，用棉球沾点胶水然后粘到纸上——你就有了幅雪景壁饰！

meanings.meaning_en: a painting that is painted on a wall, either inside or outside a building

meanings.example_cn: 这幅画显然和《最后的晚餐》有某种关联：画中的基督，和达·芬奇最伟大的壁画中心那已褪色的基督形象一样，同样空灵缥缈。

meanings.meaning_en: wood used for building or making things
meanings.example: a bench made of timber
meanings.example_cn: 木制长椅

meanings.meaning_cn: 满足；纵容；使高兴；使沉迷于…
meanings.meaning_en: to let someone have or do whatever they want, even if it is bad for them
meanings.example: His mother spoiled him, indulging his every whim.
meanings.example_cn: 他母亲对他纵容娇惯，百依百顺。

meanings.meaning_en: to put things together, especially things that are not normally together, in order to compare them or to make something new

meanings.example_cn: 威尔逊先生最常用的技巧是把事物并列起来以获得戏剧性效果。

meanings.meaning_en: the degree to which an area is filled with people or things

meanings.example_cn: 人口密度高的地区

meanings.meaning_en: to guess about the possible causes or effects of something, without knowing all the facts or details

meanings.example_cn: 她拒绝猜测。

meanings.meaning_cn: 结合；组合；联合；[化学] 化合
meanings.meaning_en: two or more different things that exist together or are used or put together
meanings.example: a combination nightclub and café
meanings.example_cn: 夜总会兼咖啡馆

meanings.meaning_en: when something begins to be known or noticed
used or intended to protect someone or something against attack
meanings.example: The prince drew up his forces in a strong defensive position.
meanings.example_cn: 亲王将部队布成坚固的防御阵势。

meanings.meaning_en: if you put someone on the defensive in an argument, you attack them so that they are in a weaker position
meanings.example: The rockets are a purely defensive measure against nuclear attack.
meanings.example_cn: 火箭弹纯粹是针对核攻击的防御性措施。

meanings.meaning_en: to encourage or help an activity to begin or develop further
meanings.example: Her interest in art was stimulated by her father.
meanings.example_cn: 她对艺术的兴趣是她父亲激发的。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where people or animals can live peacefully or go to in order to be safe
meanings.example: ...Lake Baringo, a freshwater haven for a mixed variety of birds.
meanings.example_cn: …百瑞高湖，一个适合各种鸟类的淡水栖息地。

meanings.meaning_cn: 为……提供避难处；安置……于港中
积极分子；激进主义分子
meanings.meaning_en: someone who works hard doing practical things to achieve social or political change
meanings.example: The police say they suspect the attack was carried out by animal rights activists.
meanings.example_cn: 警方说他们怀疑这次袭击是由保护动物权利的激进分子实施的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 到来；出现；基督降临；基督降临节
meanings.meaning_en: the time when something first begins to be widely used

meanings.meaning_cn: 生产的，生殖的；有生殖力的

meanings.example_cn: 既然自慰能够有助于你生宝宝，塞尔坦论证到，它必定也能服务于“生产的、团结的目的”——这可是《教义问答书》所说的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 作战；参加竞选；参加活动
meanings.meaning_en: to lead or take part in a series of actions intended to achieve a particular social or political result
meanings.example: Jones ran a good campaign.
meanings.example_cn: 琼斯的活动搞得很成功。

meanings.meaning_en: a series of actions intended to achieve a particular result relating to politics or business, or a social improvement
meanings.example: Police have launched a campaign to crack down on drug dealers.
meanings.example_cn: 警方发起了一场严厉打击毒贩的运动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 等级；等级评定；额定功率
meanings.meaning_en: a level on a scale that shows how good, important, popular etc someone or something is
meanings.example: By the end of the year the Prime Minister’s approval rating (= how many people agreed with his policies ) had fallen as low as 12 percent.
meanings.example_cn: 到年底时，首相的支持率跌到了12%的低点。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无穷小的；无限小的；极小的
meanings.meaning_en: extremely small
meanings.example: infinitesimal changes in temperature
meanings.example_cn: 气温极其微小的变化

meanings.meaning_cn: 救济；减轻，解除；安慰；浮雕
meanings.meaning_en: when something reduces someone’s pain or unhappy feelings
meanings.example: Marijuana can provide pain relief for some cancer patients.
meanings.example_cn: 大麻可以为一些癌症患者减轻疼痛。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of freeing or the state of being freed from slavery, servitude, etc
meanings.example: To a soundtrack created by the whales themselves—via Roger Payne's groundbreaking and album-charting recording of the plaintive song of the humpback whale—we moved slowly towards cetacean manumission.
meanings.example_cn: 透过鲸鱼们自己演唱，由Roger Payne's 灌录的座头鲸忧伤的歌，我们慢慢倾向了解放鲸鱼。

meanings.meaning_en: a book or piece of writing before it is printed
meanings.example: Unfortunately, parts of the original manuscript have been lost.
meanings.example_cn: 遗憾的是，部分原始手稿丢失了。

meanings.meaning_en: an activity that you do for pleasure or amusement
meanings.example: His only recreations are drinking beer and watching football.
meanings.example_cn: 他唯一的消遣就是喝啤酒和看足球比赛。

meanings.meaning_cn: 跑步者；走私者；推销员；送信人
meanings.meaning_en: someone who runs for sport or pleasure
meanings.example: a long-distance runner
meanings.example_cn: 长跑运动员

meanings.example: Harvard university was named after John Harvard, a Puritan minister who left his books and half of his estate to the college.
meanings.example_cn: 哈佛大学就得名于约翰•哈佛，一个将他的所有书籍和半数财产都留给学校的清教徒牧师。

meanings.meaning_en: The Puritans were a group of English Protestants in the sixteenth and seventeenth centuries who lived in a very strict and religious way
meanings.example: Here I am in a pulpit, dressed like a Puritan minister —an apparition that would have horrified many of my distinguished forebears and perhaps rededicated some of them to the extirpation of witches.
meanings.example_cn: 站在这个讲坛上，我穿得像个清教徒教长——一个可能会吓到我的杰出前辈们的怪物，或许使他们中的一些人重新致力于铲除巫婆的事业上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 自动的；无意识的；必然的
meanings.meaning_en: an automatic machine is designed to work without needing someone to operate it for each part of a process
meanings.example: an automatic weapon
meanings.example_cn: 自动武器

meanings.meaning_en: a weapon that can fire bullets continuously
meanings.example: an automatic gearbox
meanings.example_cn: 自动变速箱

meanings.meaning_en: having three parts or involving three groups, people, events etc
meanings.example: a triple murder investigation
meanings.example_cn: 对一宗三重谋杀案的调查

meanings.example: a triple bill of horror movies
meanings.example_cn: 三部恐怖电影的连续放映

meanings.meaning_en: to increase by three times as much, or to make something do this
meanings.example: the triple world champion
meanings.example_cn: 三连冠世界冠军

meanings.meaning_en: to copy the way someone speaks or behaves, especially in order to make people laugh
meanings.example: He could mimic all the teachers’ accents.
meanings.example_cn: 他能模仿所有老师的口音。

meanings.meaning_cn: 效颦者，模仿者；仿制品；小丑
meanings.example: ‘I’m so sorry,’ she mimicked.
meanings.example_cn: “很抱歉。”她学着说道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 高地；海拔；提高；崇高；正面图
meanings.meaning_en: a height above the level of the sea
meanings.example: the front elevation of a house
meanings.example_cn: 房子的正面外观

meanings.meaning_en: a union of two or more political parties that allows them to form a government or fight an election together
meanings.example: the centre-right coalition government
meanings.example_cn: 政治上中间偏右的联合政府

meanings.meaning_cn: 详细审查；监视；细看；选票复查
meanings.example: Their activities have come under police scrutiny .
meanings.example_cn: 他们的活动受到警方的严密监视。

meanings.meaning_cn: 下降；下去；下来；遗传；屈尊
meanings.meaning_en: to move from a higher level to a lower one
meanings.example: Our plane started to descend.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的飞机开始下降。

meanings.meaning_cn: 走私；走私货；战时禁运品（等于contraband of war）
meanings.meaning_en: goods that are brought into a country illegally, especially to avoid tax
meanings.example: a cargo of contraband
meanings.example_cn: 一批走私货

meanings.meaning_en: Someone who is detached is not personally involved in something or has no emotional interest in it
meanings.example: He tries to remain emotionally detached from the prisoners, but fails.
meanings.example_cn: 他想尽力保持对囚犯们不掺杂个人感情，却做不到。

meanings.meaning_en: to make it difficult for something to develop or succeed
meanings.example: His career has been hindered by injury.
meanings.example_cn: 由于受伤，他的事业受到了阻碍。

meanings.meaning_en: situated at or further towards the back or rear; posterior
meanings.example: policies that will hinder rather than help families
meanings.example_cn: 对家庭有害无益的政策

meanings.example: the hinder parts

meanings.meaning_cn: 征收；强加；欺骗；不公平的负担

meanings.meaning_en: to make small changes to something in order to improve it and make it more suitable or effective
meanings.example: The feedback will be used to modify the course for next year.
meanings.example_cn: 这些反馈意见将用于修改明年的课程。

meanings.meaning_cn: 作文，作曲，作品；[材] 构成；合成物；成分
meanings.meaning_en: the way in which something is made up of different parts, things, or members
meanings.example: Some minerals have complex chemical compositions.
meanings.example_cn: 有些矿物的化学构成很复杂。

meanings.meaning_cn: [数] 集合；一套；布景；[机] 装置
meanings.meaning_en: a group of similar things that belong together or are related in some way
meanings.example: a chess set
meanings.example_cn: 一副国际象棋

meanings.meaning_en: a set amount, time etc is fixed and is never changed
someone who believes in the ideas of a great teacher or leader, especially a religious one
meanings.example: ...a major intellectual figure with disciples throughout Europe.
meanings.example_cn: …一位信徒遍布欧洲的重要知识分子。

meanings.meaning_en: disagreement, angry feelings, or unfriendliness between people
meanings.example: Putting oil on both surfaces reduces friction.
meanings.example_cn: 两面都上油可减小摩擦力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 阐明，说明；照亮；使灿烂；用灯装饰
meanings.meaning_en: to make a light shine on something, or to fill a place with light
meanings.example: A single candle illuminated his face.
meanings.example_cn: 一支蜡烛照亮了他的脸。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of energy, oil, electricity etc that is used
meanings.example: Vigorous exercise increases oxygen consumption.
meanings.example_cn: 剧烈运动增加氧的消耗。

meanings.meaning_en: to hide something carefully
meanings.example: The shadows concealed her as she crept up to the house.
meanings.example_cn: 她借着阴影蹑手蹑脚地走向房子。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to your body’s metabolism
meanings.example: Exercise can increase your metabolic rate.
meanings.example_cn: 运动可以提高新陈代谢率。

meanings.meaning_en: If you describe something as unpromising, you think that it is unlikely to be successful or produce anything good in the future
meanings.example: In fact, his business career had distinctly unpromising beginnings.
meanings.example_cn: 事实上，他的职业生涯开始时看起来非常没有前途。

meanings.meaning_cn: 教育家；教育工作者；教师
meanings.meaning_en: a teacher or someone involved in the process of educating people
meanings.example: What more could an educator hope for than a student's desire to learn.
meanings.example_cn: 除了学生的学习兴趣，教育者们别无所求。

meanings.meaning_cn: 求援，求助；[经] 追索权；依赖；救生索
meanings.meaning_en: something that you do to achieve something or deal with a situation, or the act of doing it
meanings.example: We may conclude that he never had recourse to this simple experiment.
meanings.example_cn: 我们也许可以断定，他根本就没有试过这个简单的实验。

meanings.meaning_cn: [数] 极大，最大限度；最大量
meanings.meaning_en: the largest number or amount that is possible or is allowed
meanings.example: We might have a third child, but that’s the absolute maximum .
meanings.example_cn: 我们可能会要第三个孩子，但这绝对是极限了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 最高的；最多的；最大极限的
meanings.meaning_en: the maximum amount, quantity, speed etc is the largest that is possible or allowed
A parallel is an imaginary line round the earth that is parallel to the equator. Parallels are shown on maps.
meanings.example: ...the area south of the 38th parallel.
meanings.example_cn: …38度纬线以南的地区。

meanings.meaning_en: two lines, paths etc that are parallel to each other are the same distance apart along their whole length

meanings.meaning_cn: 连贯的，一致的；明了的；清晰的；凝聚性的；互相耦合的；粘在一起的
meanings.meaning_en: if a piece of writing, set of ideas etc is coherent, it is easy to understand because it is clear and reasonable
meanings.example: The three years of the course are planned as a coherent whole.
meanings.example_cn: 这三年的课程是作为连贯的整体来安排的。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two areas that are on the left or the right of an imaginary line, or on the left or the right of a border, wall, river etc
meanings.example: Fuel is cheaper on the French side of the border.
meanings.example_cn: 燃料在边境那边的法国要便宜些。

meanings.meaning_en: to support or argue against a person or group in a quarrel, fight etc
meanings.example: A man stood watching me from the other side of the road.
meanings.example_cn: 有个男人站在马路的对面看着我。

meanings.meaning_en: in or on the side of something
meanings.example: His friends and family were all on the other side of the world.
meanings.example_cn: 他的朋友和家人都在地球的另一边。

meanings.meaning_en: to change something in order to improve it and make it seem more modern
meanings.example: Many older companies are revamping their image.
meanings.example_cn: 很多老牌公司都在更新公司形象。

meanings.meaning_en: Revamp is also a noun
meanings.example: The revamp includes replacing the old navy uniform with a crisp blue and white cotton outfit.
meanings.example_cn: 改进的内容包括将旧海军制服换成清新的蓝白相间的棉套装。

meanings.meaning_en: a number representing another number in a mathematical system so that complicated calculations can be done as simple addition
meanings.example: This led him to calculate that the information content of any event was proportional to the logarithm of its inverse probability of occurrence.
meanings.example_cn: 这使他提出了这样的推论：事件的信息容量与事件发生逆概率的对数成正比。

meanings.meaning_en: a shape with six sides
meanings.example: He presses the bolt against a small hexagon tattooed on his forearm. The sizes match.
meanings.example_cn: 他将螺钉与他前臂的一个小六边形纹身比了比，尺寸是一样的。

meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement which you make so that a place in a hotel, restaurant, plane etc is kept for you at a particular time in the future
meanings.example: a dinner reservation
meanings.example_cn: 预订晚餐

meanings.meaning_en: If you dissociate yourself from something or someone, you say or show that you are not connected with them, usually in order to avoid trouble or blame
meanings.example: It seems harder and harder for the president to dissociate himself from the scandals that surround Mr. Galdos.
meanings.example_cn: 看来总统越来越难以从缠绕盖尔多斯先生的丑闻中脱身。

meanings.meaning_cn: 广告；记帐；开发票；演员表；总账款
meanings.meaning_en: A bill is a written statement of money that you owe for goods or services
meanings.example: They couldn't afford to pay the bills.
meanings.example_cn: 他们付不起账。

meanings.meaning_en: If you bill someone for goods or services you have provided them with, you give or send them a bill stating how much money they owe you for these goods or services
meanings.example: He paid his bill for the newspapers promptly.
meanings.example_cn: 他立刻付了报纸的帐单。

meanings.meaning_cn: 代替；[数] 置换；代替物
meanings.meaning_en: when someone or something is replaced by someone or something else, or the person or thing being replaced
meanings.example: Coach Ross made two substitutions in the second half.
meanings.example_cn: 罗斯教练在下半场两次换人。

meanings.meaning_en: an extremely bad headache, during which you feel sick and have pain behind your eyes
meanings.example: Her mother suffered from migraines.
meanings.example_cn: 她母亲患了偏头痛。

meanings.meaning_cn: 会议；（法庭的）开庭；（议会等的）开会；学期；讲习会
meanings.meaning_en: a formal meeting or group of meetings, especially of a law court or parliament
meanings.example: Board members met in closed session (= with nobody else present ) .
meanings.example_cn: 委员会成员举行了闭门会议。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of thinking about something, especially one which is influenced by the type of person you are or by your experiences
meanings.example: the artist’s use of perspective
meanings.example_cn: 那位画家对透视法的运用

meanings.meaning_en: when one company takes control of another by buying more than half its  shares
meanings.example: Thornbury has announced a takeover bid of a regional TV company.
meanings.example_cn: 索恩伯里已经宣布将出价收购一家地方电视公司。

meanings.meaning_en: a statueof a famous person
meanings.example: In Paraguay, people create an effigy and dress him up like a scarecrow when the new year comes.
meanings.example_cn: 每逢新年来临，巴拉圭人都会专门制作雕像，然后把雕像打扮成稻草人的样子。

meanings.meaning_en: good and likely to bring good results
meanings.example: a propitious moment
meanings.example_cn: 有利时机

meanings.meaning_cn: 元素；要素；原理；成分；自然环境
meanings.meaning_en: one part or feature of a whole system, plan, piece of work etc, especially one that is basic or important
meanings.example: Business and management elements are built into the course.
meanings.example_cn: 本课程加入了商务和管理方面的内容。

meanings.meaning_en: a gas that has no colour or smell, and that forms most of the Earth’s air. It is a chemical element: symbol N
meanings.example: Well, we know nitrogen has what?
meanings.example_cn: 对于氮气我们知道什么？

meanings.meaning_en: to use something for a particular purpose
meanings.example: We must consider how best to utilize what resources we have.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须考虑怎样充分利用现有的资源。

meanings.meaning_cn: 指定；详细说明；列举；把…列入说明书
meanings.meaning_en: to state something in an exact and detailed way
meanings.example: Payments will be made for a specified number of months.
meanings.example_cn: 款项将在规定的几个月内支付。

meanings.meaning_cn: 运输；运输系统；运输工具；流放
meanings.meaning_en: a system or method for carrying passengers or goods from one place to another
meanings.example: The city needs to improve its public transportation (= buses, trains etc ) .
meanings.example_cn: 这座城市需要改善公共交通。

meanings.example: No one is casting aspersions on you or your men, Major.
meanings.example_cn: 没有人责难你或你的手下，少校。

meanings.meaning_cn: 动作；移动；手势；请求；意向；议案
meanings.meaning_en: the process of moving or the way that someone or something moves
meanings.example: Newton’s first law of motion
meanings.example_cn: 牛顿第一运动定律

meanings.meaning_cn: 常出没于…；萦绕于…；经常去…
meanings.meaning_en: if the soul of a dead person haunts a place, it appears there often
meanings.example: The pub is said to be haunted by the ghost of a former landlord.
meanings.example_cn: 据说这个酒吧里经常有一位前任房主的鬼魂出没。

meanings.meaning_en: a place that someone likes to go to often
a set of clothes worn together, especially for a special occasion
meanings.example: She bought a new outfit for the party.
meanings.example_cn: 她为了这次派对买了套新衣服。

meanings.meaning_en: to provide someone or something with a set of clothes or equipment, especially ones that are needed for a particular purpose
meanings.example: a cowboy outfit
meanings.example_cn: 一套牛仔服装

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the job of a manager
meanings.example: managerial skills
meanings.example_cn: 管理技巧

meanings.meaning_en: a strong substance that can bend, which is around the joints in your body and in your outer ear
meanings.example: Andre Agassi has pulled out of next week's Grand Slam Cup after tearing a cartilage in his chest.
meanings.example_cn: 安德烈·阿加西胸部软骨拉伤后已退出了下周的大满贯赛事。

meanings.meaning_cn: 安全的；无虑的；有把握的；稳当的
meanings.meaning_en: safe from and protected against damage or attack
meanings.example: Companies can offer secure credit card transactions over the Internet.
meanings.example_cn: 公司可以提供安全的网上信用卡交易。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something safe from being attacked, harmed, or lost
a group of animals or plants whose members are similar and can breed together to produce young animals or plants
meanings.example: Seven species of birds of prey have been observed.
meanings.example_cn: 已有七种猛禽被观察到。

meanings.example: pandas and other endangered species
meanings.example_cn: 熊猫以及其他濒危物种

meanings.meaning_cn: 最重要的，主要的；至高无上的
meanings.meaning_en: more important than anything else
meanings.example: During a war the interests of the state are paramount, and those of the individual come last.
meanings.example_cn: 战争时期国家利益是首要的，个人利益置于最后。

meanings.example: Women’s role as mothers is of paramount importance to society.
meanings.example_cn: 女性作为母亲的角色对社会至关重要。

meanings.meaning_en: dealing with ideas, or based on them
meanings.example: the conceptual framework of the play
meanings.example_cn: 该剧的概念框架

meanings.meaning_en: an insuperable difficulty or problem is impossible to deal with
meanings.example: There were insuperable obstacles, and the plan was abandoned.
meanings.example_cn: 由于存在无法克服的障碍，计划被放弃了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不情愿的；勉强的；顽抗的
meanings.meaning_en: slow and unwilling
meanings.example: She gave a reluctant smile.
meanings.example_cn: 她勉强笑了笑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 破裂，断裂；[外科] 骨折
meanings.meaning_en: a crack or broken part in a bone or other hard substance
meanings.example: a stress fracture in his left knee
meanings.example_cn: 他左膝上的应力性骨折

meanings.meaning_en: if a bone or other hard substance fractures, or if it is fractured, it breaks or cracks
meanings.example: a hairline fracture
meanings.example_cn: 细小的裂缝

meanings.meaning_en: if a belief, custom, situation etc prevails, it exists among a group of people at a certain time
meanings.example: Justice will prevail.
meanings.example_cn: 正义终将获胜。

meanings.meaning_cn: 中世纪的；原始的；仿中世纪的；老式的
meanings.meaning_en: connected with the Middle Ages (= the period between about 1100 and 1500 AD )
meanings.example: These spices were first brought to Italy from the East in medieval times.
meanings.example_cn: 这些香料最早是在中世纪时从东方被带到了意大利。

meanings.meaning_cn: 经验主义的，完全根据经验的；实证的
meanings.meaning_en: based on scientific testing or practical experience, not on ideas
meanings.example: {"COLLOINEXA":["empirical evidence"]}
meanings.example_cn: 实验证据

meanings.meaning_en: the exact opposite of what has just been mentioned
meanings.example: I owe you nothing. If anything, the reverse is true (= you owe me ) .
meanings.example_cn: 我不欠你什么。 如果说欠的话，是你欠我才对。

meanings.meaning_en: if a vehicle or its driver reverses, they go backwards
the back of something

meanings.meaning_cn: 树干；躯干；象鼻；汽车车尾的行李箱
meanings.meaning_en: the thick central woody stem of a tree
meanings.example: He left his bicycle leaning against a tree trunk .
meanings.example_cn: 他把他的自行车斜靠在树干上。

meanings.meaning_en: to remember information
meanings.example: I find it very difficult to retain facts.
meanings.example_cn: 我觉得具体事实很难记住。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有独创性的；机灵的，精制的；心灵手巧的
meanings.meaning_en: an ingenious plan, idea, or object works well and is the result of clever thinking and new ideas
meanings.example: Many fish have ingenious ways of protecting their eggs from predators.
meanings.example_cn: 很多鱼都有绝妙的方法来保护它们产的卵不被捕食者吃掉。

meanings.meaning_cn: 储备，储存；自然保护区；预备队；缄默；[金融] 储备金
meanings.meaning_en: a supply of something kept to be used if it is needed
meanings.example: $10 million in cash reserves
meanings.example_cn: 1,000万美元的现金储备

meanings.meaning_en: to arrange for a place in a hotel, restaurant, plane etc to be kept for you to use at a particular time in the future
meanings.example: oil reserves
meanings.example_cn: 石油储备

meanings.meaning_en: a part of a whole number in mathematics, such as ½ or ¾

meanings.meaning_cn: 封建制度的；领地的；世仇的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to feudalism
meanings.example: the feudal system
meanings.example_cn: 封建制度

meanings.meaning_cn: 决定；溶解；使…分解；决心要做…
meanings.meaning_en: to find a satisfactory way of dealing with a problem or difficulty
meanings.example: Barnet was desperate for money to resolve his financial problems.
meanings.example_cn: 巴尼特急需钱来解决他的经济问题。

meanings.meaning_en: strong determination to succeed in doing something

meanings.meaning_cn: [有化][药] 咖啡因；茶精（兴奋剂）
meanings.meaning_en: a substance in tea, coffee, and some other drinks that makes you feel more active
meanings.example: Avoid caffeine (= drinks with caffeine ) before bedtime.
meanings.example_cn: 睡觉前不要喝含有咖啡因的饮料。

meanings.meaning_cn: 内脏；肠子；剧情；胆量；海峡；勇气；直觉；肠
meanings.meaning_en: a reaction or feeling that you are sure is right, although you cannot give a reason for it
meanings.example: He had a gut feeling that Sarah was lying.

meanings.meaning_en: very poor

as much as is needed for a particular purpose

meanings.meaning_cn: 相当大的；重要的，值得考虑的

meanings.meaning_cn: 梯形的；[数] 不规则四边形的

meanings.example: This may be partly for fear of making a near-reality of private landownership, which would undermine one of the last vestiges of the party’s communist heritage.

meanings.meaning_en: a liquid that is put in the water in car engines to stop it from freezing
